  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the delivery confirmation record.']

  Note: 'Record of proof-of-delivery (POD) for completed chemical shipments. Captures actual delivery date and time, receiver name and signature, delivery location, condition of goods on arrival, any noted discrepancies (shortage, damage, contamination), exception codes, and electronic POD document reference. Triggers downstream billing and COA release workflows.'
}

Table logistics.advance_ship_notice {
  advance_ship_notice_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for advance_ship_notice']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Advance ship notice stores carrier information as free text; adding carrier_id normalizes to carrier table.']
  material_master_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to rawmaterial.material_master. Business justification: ASN generation includes SKU and hazard details; linking to material_master guarantees accurate material identification and regulatory compliance for the shipment.']
  parent_logistics_shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Advance Ship Notice (ASN) is sent for a specific shipment; linking provides the parent relationship.']
  primary_advance_site_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customer or receiving facility for the shipment.']
  research_trial_batch_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.trial_batch. Business justification: ASN processing for pilot‑scale batches requires linking the notice to the trial batch record for scheduling and compliance.']
  supplier_asn_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.asn. Business justification: Links internal ASN record to supplier‑provided ASN for reconciliation and compliance reporting.']
  advance_ship_notice_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the ASN.']
  asn_acknowledged_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the receiving party acknowledged receipt of the ASN.']
  asn_number varchar [note: 'External ASN identifier exchanged with trading partners.']
  asn_sent_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the ASN was transmitted to the trading partner.']
  asn_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the ASN purpose.']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'Manufacturing batch identifier for the shipped product.']
  carrier_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Primary phone number for carrier communications.']
  carrier_pro_number varchar [note: 'Carrier\'s shipment tracking number (PRO number).']
  carrier_scac_code varchar [note: 'Standard Carrier Alpha Code identifying the carrier.']
  compliance_document_number varchar [note: 'Reference number for regulatory compliance documentation (e.g., DOT manifest).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the ASN record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for freight amounts.']
  delivery_window_end date [note: 'Latest date the receiver can accept the shipment.']
  delivery_window_start date [note: 'Earliest date the receiver is prepared to accept the shipment.']
  expected_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Planned date and time when the shipment is expected to arrive at the destination.']
  freight_adjustment_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Adjustments, discounts, or surcharges applied to the freight charge.']
  freight_gross_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total freight charge before any adjustments.']
  freight_net_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Final freight charge after adjustments.']
  freight_terms varchar [note: 'Incoterm governing freight cost responsibilities.']
  hazmat_classification varchar [note: 'Hazard class of the hazardous material per DOT 49 CFR.']
  hazmat_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the shipment contains regulated hazardous materials.']
  lot_number varchar [note: 'Lot identifier for traceability of the shipped product batch.']
  number_of_packages varchar [note: 'Count of individual packages or containers in the shipment.']
  package_type_code varchar [note: 'Standard code describing the type of packaging used.']
  po_number varchar [note: 'Purchase order identifier associated with the shipment.']
  product_description varchar [note: 'Brief description of the product(s) shipped.']
  product_sku varchar [note: 'Stock Keeping Unit of the primary product in the shipment.']
  regulatory_reporting_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the shipment requires additional regulatory reporting.']
  route_optimization_flag boolean [note: 'True if the shipment route was generated by an optimization engine.']
  sales_order_number varchar [note: 'Sales order identifier linked to the ASN.']
  shipping_instructions varchar [note: 'Special handling or delivery instructions for the carrier.']
  shipping_mode varchar [note: 'Logistics shipping mode indicating load planning strategy.']
  total_volume_m3 decimal(10,3) [note: 'Aggregate volume of all items in the shipment.']
  total_weight_kg decimal(10,3) [note: 'Aggregate weight of all items in the shipment.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Primary mode of transport used for the shipment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the ASN record.']

  Note: 'Advanced Shipping Notice (ASN) transmitted to customers or receiving facilities prior to shipment arrival. Contains ASN number, expected arrival date/time, shipment contents summary, lot and batch details, packing list reference, carrier and PRO number, hazmat pre-notification flag, and EDI 856 transaction reference. Enables receiving facilities to prepare for regulated chemical receipt and FEFO inventory management.'
}

Table logistics.hazmat_declaration {
  hazmat_declaration_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for the hazmat declaration record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the carrier (e.g., MC/MX number).']
  compound_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.compound_registry. Business justification: Regulatory reporting links hazardous shipment declarations to the registered compound for accurate SDS and compliance tracking.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Hazmat surcharge and compliance costs are charged to the cost center responsible for the shipment.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who performed the compliance review.']
  formula_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to formulation.formula. Business justification: Regulatory shipping compliance requires linking each hazmat declaration to the formula that defines the product\'s hazardous properties for accurate reporting and traceability.']
  material_master_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to rawmaterial.material_master. Business justification: Hazmat Declaration must reference the exact material to populate UN number, hazard class, and safety data; a material_master_id FK provides the authoritative source.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Profitability analysis includes hazmat handling fees allocated to the profit center of the product line.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the shipment to which this hazmat declaration belongs.']
  applicable_regulation varchar [note: 'Regulatory framework governing the shipment (DOT, IATA, or IMDG).']
  compliance_review_date date [note: 'Date when the declaration was last reviewed for compliance.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the declaration record was created.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the hazmat declaration becomes effective.']
  emergency_response_guide_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the applicable Emergency Response Guide.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which the declaration is no longer valid (if applicable).']
  hazard_class varchar [note: 'Hazard class of the material (e.g., 1, 2, 3, …). [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: 1|2|3|4|5|6|7|8|9 — promote to reference product]']
  hazard_division varchar [note: 'Division within the hazard class, if applicable (e.g., 1A, 1B).']
  hazmat_declaration_status varchar [note: 'Current approval status of the hazmat declaration.']
  is_exempt boolean [note: 'Indicates if the shipment is exempt from certain regulations.']
  is_hazardous boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the material is classified as hazardous.']
  line_number varchar [note: 'Sequential line number of the declaration within the shipment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any additional information or comments.']
  packaging_type varchar [note: 'Type of packaging used for the hazardous material.']
  packing_group varchar [note: 'Packing group indicating the degree of danger (I, II, or III).']
  ppe_requirements varchar [note: 'Required PPE for personnel handling the shipment.']
  proper_shipping_name varchar [note: 'Official shipping name as defined in the UN Model Regulations.']
  quantity decimal(12,3) [note: 'Amount of hazardous material declared.']
  quantity_uom varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the quantity (kilograms, liters, gallons, pounds).']
  regulation_section varchar [note: 'Specific section of the regulation that applies (e.g., 49 CFR 172.200).']
  segregation_requirements varchar [note: 'Special segregation or incompatibility requirements for transport.']
  shipper_certification varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the shipper is certified for the material.']
  spill_response_instructions varchar [note: 'Procedures to follow in case of a spill during transport.']
  temperature_limit_max decimal(8,2) [note: 'Maximum allowable temperature for transport.']
  temperature_limit_min decimal(8,2) [note: 'Minimum allowable temperature for transport.']
  temperature_uom varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for temperature limits (Celsius or Fahrenheit).']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transport used for the shipment.']
  un_number varchar [note: 'UN numeric identifier for the hazardous material.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the declaration.']

  Note: 'Consolidated hazardous materials compliance record for each regulated chemical shipment line, combining SDS-derived transport requirements with DOT 49 CFR, IATA DGR, and IMDG Code shipping declarations. Records UN number, proper shipping name, hazard class and division, packing group, quantity and type of packaging, emergency response guide number (ERG), shipper certification, segregation requirements for incompatible chemicals, temperature limits during transport, PPE requirements for drivers, spill response instructions, and applicable transport regulation. Serves as the single source of truth for all hazmat transport compliance data — from SDS-sourced chemical properties through to regulatory declaration filing. Mandatory for all chemical shipments involving hazardous materials per DOT 49 CFR §172.200-204.'
}

Table logistics.shipment_plan {
  shipment_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for shipment_plan']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the transportation carrier assigned to the plan.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Planning costs (fuel surcharge, route optimization) are budgeted against the cost center owning the shipment.']
  loading_dock_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dock where loading is scheduled.']
  parent_logistics_shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Shipment plan is created to plan a particular shipment; linking to shipment establishes the parent‑child hierarchy.']
  production_schedule_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to planning.production_schedule. Business justification: Integrated Production & Logistics Scheduling aligns route plans with the Production Schedule for on‑time departures.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Profitability analysis uses planned shipment cost data linked to the profit center of the product line.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the shipper (customer) who owns the shipment.']
  alternate_route_options varchar [note: 'Text description of alternate routes considered during planning.']
  arrival_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for shipment arrival.']
  bridge_restriction_flag boolean [note: 'True if the route is prohibited for certain hazmat due to bridge weight/height restrictions.']
  compliance_volume_limit_m3 decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum allowable volume per DOT regulations for the selected route.']
  compliance_weight_limit_kg decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum allowable weight per DOT regulations for the selected route.']
  cost_adjustments decimal(12,2) [note: 'Sum of all cost adjustments (fees, discounts, surcharges) applied to the shipment.']
  cost_gross decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total gross cost of the shipment before any adjustments.']
  cost_net decimal(12,2) [note: 'Final net cost after applying adjustments.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first captured in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the shipment cost.']
  departure_date date [note: 'Scheduled date for shipment departure.']
  estimated_transit_time_minutes varchar [note: 'Projected total transit time for the route, in minutes.']
  fuel_surcharge_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary amount of the fuel surcharge applied to the shipment.']
  fuel_surcharge_basis varchar [note: 'Method used to calculate fuel surcharge.']
  hazmat_route_flag boolean [note: 'True when the route is designated for hazardous material transport.']
  is_expedited boolean [note: 'True if the shipment is marked for expedited handling.']
  load_volume_m3 decimal(12,2) [note: 'Actual volume loaded onto the vehicle after consolidation.']
  load_weight_kg decimal(12,2) [note: 'Actual weight loaded onto the vehicle after consolidation.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any special instructions or comments.']
  optimization_objective varchar [note: 'Primary objective used for route and load optimization.']
  plan_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the shipment plan.']
  plan_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the shipment plan was generated.']
  planned_arrival_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact timestamp when the shipment is expected to reach the destination.']
  planned_departure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact timestamp when the shipment is expected to leave the origin.']
  restricted_route_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates if the route includes any regulatory restrictions (e.g., tunnel/bridge limits).']
  route_description varchar [note: 'Human‑readable description of the planned route, including waypoints.']
  route_distance_km decimal(10,2) [note: 'Total distance of the planned route, in kilometers.']
  shipment_plan_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the shipment plan.']
  temperature_zone varchar [note: 'Temperature control requirement for the shipment load.']
  total_volume_m3 decimal(12,2) [note: 'Aggregate volume of all items in the shipment plan.']
  total_weight_kg decimal(12,2) [note: 'Aggregate weight of all items in the shipment plan.']
  tunnel_restriction_flag boolean [note: 'True if the route is prohibited for certain hazmat due to tunnel restrictions.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the shipment plan record.']
  vehicle_capacity_volume_m3 decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum volume the vehicle can carry, in cubic meters.']
  vehicle_capacity_weight_kg decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum weight the vehicle can carry, in kilograms.']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Type of vehicle assigned to execute the shipment.']

  Note: 'Consolidated shipment planning record combining route optimization and load planning for one or more shipments. Captures planned route legs, waypoints, estimated transit times, distance, fuel surcharge basis, restricted route flags (tunnel/bridge restrictions for hazmat per DOT 49 CFR §397.71), alternate route options, optimization objective (cost/time/compliance), load consolidation details, vehicle type and capacity assignment, actual loaded weight and volume, load sequence, temperature zone assignments for mixed chemical loads, and loading dock assignment. Supports DOT hazmat routing compliance, freight utilization optimization, and DOT weight compliance.'
}

Table logistics.freight_rate {
  freight_rate_id varchar [pk, note: 'Surrogate primary key uniquely identifying each freight rate record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the carrier (shipping provider) that offers this rate.']
  commodity_class varchar [note: 'Chemical commodity classification (e.g., petrochemical, specialty, bulk) for which the rate is negotiated.']
  compliance_hazmat_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the rate complies with hazardous material transport regulations.']
  contract_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the rate contract (e.g., contracted, spot, dynamic pricing).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the freight rate record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the monetary values.']
  destination_zone varchar [note: 'Destination geographic or tariff zone code used in rate calculations.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the rate becomes effective and may be used for cost calculations.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the rate expires; null if the rate is open‑ended.']
  freight_rate_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form text describing special conditions, lane details, or notes.']
  freight_rate_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the rate record.']
  fuel_surcharge_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Fuel surcharge expressed as a percentage of the base rate.']
  hazmat_surcharge decimal(12,4) [note: 'Additional surcharge for transporting hazardous chemicals, per regulatory requirements (DOT 49 CFR).']
  is_contractual boolean [note: 'True if the rate is part of a contracted agreement; false for spot rates.']
  lane_type varchar [note: 'Description of the shipment lane configuration.']
  minimum_charge decimal(12,4) [note: 'Minimum charge that applies regardless of distance or weight.']
  mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transport for which the rate applies.']
  origin_zone varchar [note: 'Origin geographic or tariff zone code used in rate calculations.']
  rate_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or code used by logistics planners to reference the rate.']
  rate_source_system varchar [note: 'System of record that originated the rate (e.g., OTM, SAP, custom).']
  rate_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the rate (e.g., base, accessorial, fuel surcharge).']
  rate_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Numeric value of the rate expressed in the selected unit of measure.']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the regulatory rule or document governing the rate (e.g., DOT 49 CFR, REACH).']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit in which the rate value is expressed (e.g., CWT per mile, flat fee).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the freight rate record.']
  volume_limit_cubic_meters decimal(10,2) [note: 'Maximum volume for which the rate applies; null if unlimited.']
  weight_limit_kg decimal(10,2) [note: 'Maximum weight for which the rate applies; null if unlimited.']

  Note: 'Contracted or spot freight rate records negotiated with carriers for specific lanes, modes, and chemical commodity types. Stores rate type (base/accessorial/fuel surcharge), origin and destination zone, carrier, effective and expiry dates, rate per unit (CWT/mile/flat), minimum charge, hazmat surcharge, and Oracle TMS rate table reference. Drives freight cost calculation and carrier selection optimization.'
}

Table logistics.freight_invoice {
  freight_invoice_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for each freight invoice.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Linking invoices to the owning customer account is required for financial audit trails and customer billing statements.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the carrier that issued the freight invoice.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Invoice posting requires the cost center to allocate freight charges in the general ledger.']
  internal_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.internal_order. Business justification: Linking invoice to internal order enables reconciliation of invoiced amount with approved spend.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Profitability reporting needs freight invoice amounts linked to the profit center generating the sale.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the shipment to which this invoice relates.']
  shipment_plan_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the transportation route applied to the shipment.']
  accessorial_charges_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Sum of all ancillary service fees on the invoice.']
  approved_payment_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final amount authorized for payment to the carrier.']
  audit_pass_flag boolean [note: 'True if the invoice passed the freight audit; false otherwise.']
  audit_variance_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Dollar amount of variance between invoiced charges and audited rates.']
  base_freight_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Core transportation charge before surcharges and accessorials.']
  bill_of_lading_number varchar [note: 'Carrier‑issued document number confirming shipment receipt.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter code of the currency used for the invoice (e.g., USD, EUR).']
  demurrage_detention_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Charges incurred for delayed loading/unloading or container detention.']
  dispute_status varchar [note: 'Current dispute handling state for the invoice.']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which Chemical Mfg must remit payment for the freight invoice.']
  freight_contract_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the rate contract governing the freight service.']
  freight_order_number varchar [note: 'Internal order number used for rate agreement and planning of the freight movement.']
  fuel_surcharge_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Additional charge reflecting fuel price adjustments.']
  hazardous_material_flag boolean [note: 'True when the freight includes hazardous chemicals subject to DOT/REACH regulations.']
  hazmat_fee_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Fee charged for transporting regulated hazardous chemicals.']
  invoice_date date [note: 'Calendar date on which the carrier generated the freight invoice.']
  invoice_number varchar [note: 'External invoice number provided by the carrier for this freight transaction.']
  invoice_status varchar [note: 'Workflow status of the freight invoice within the AP process.']
  invoice_type varchar [note: 'Category of freight service reflected by the invoice.']
  payment_date date [note: 'Calendar date on which the invoice was paid.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Payment instrument selected for settling the invoice.']
  purchase_order_number varchar [note: 'Internal PO number that triggered the freight movement.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the freight invoice record was first inserted into the lakehouse.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the freight invoice record.']
  remarks varchar [note: 'Additional notes or comments related to the invoice.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Applicable tax levied on the freight charges.']
  total_invoice_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Aggregate amount of all charges before tax.']
  variance_reason_code varchar [note: 'Standard code indicating the root cause of the audit variance.']
  volume_cubic_meters decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total cubic meter volume of the shipment.']
  weight_kg decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total weight of the shipment in kilograms.']

  Note: 'Carrier-issued freight invoice submitted to Chemical Mfg for transportation services rendered, incorporating automated freight audit results. Captures invoice number, carrier, shipment and freight order references, billed charges (base freight, fuel surcharge, accessorials, hazmat fees, demurrage/detention charges), invoice date, payment due date, dispute status, audit variance amount, audit pass/fail flag, variance reason codes, and approved payment amount. Feeds into finance domain for AP processing and logistics cost accounting. Supports three-way match validation (freight order rate vs delivery confirmation vs invoice) per chemical industry freight payment best practices.'
}

Table logistics.customs_declaration {
  customs_declaration_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the customs declaration record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'System identifier for the carrier entity.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Customs duties and fees are booked to the cost center that owns the imported material.']
  invoice_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.invoice. Business justification: Customs duties are billed; linking declaration to invoice enables duty charge aggregation on the same invoice.']
  parent_logistics_shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Customs declaration is filed for a specific shipment; linking provides direct reference to the shipment.']
  primary_customs_account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the exporting party (company) responsible for the shipment.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Profitability reporting requires customs cost allocation to the profit center generating the revenue.']
  asn_number varchar [note: 'Reference number for the ASN generated for the outbound shipment.']
  bill_of_lading_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the bill of lading associated with the shipment.']
  clearance_date date [note: 'Date on which customs clearance was completed or finalized.']
  clearance_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the customs clearance process.']
  compliance_notes varchar [note: 'Free‑text field for any additional compliance observations or remarks.']
  country_of_origin varchar [note: 'Three‑letter country code where the chemical product was manufactured or sourced.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the customs declaration record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the declared value (e.g., USD, EUR).']
  customs_broker_name varchar [note: 'Name of the licensed customs broker handling the declaration.']
  declaration_date date [note: 'Date the customs declaration was filed with the authority.']
  declaration_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the customs declaration by the logistics or customs system.']
  declaration_status varchar [note: 'Overall processing status of the customs declaration.']
  declaration_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the declaration is for an export shipment or an import shipment.']
  declared_value decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary value declared for customs assessment, expressed in the transaction currency.']
  destination_country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter country code of the final destination for the shipment.']
  duty_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary amount of customs duty assessed on the shipment.']
  duty_currency varchar [note: 'Currency in which the duty amount is expressed.']
  eccn varchar [note: 'Alphanumeric code used by U.S. export control to classify dual‑use items.']
  freight_cost decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total freight charge for the shipment.']
  freight_currency varchar [note: 'Currency of the freight cost (ISO 4217).']
  hazardous_classification varchar [note: 'UN number or class describing the hazardous nature of the chemical.']
  hazardous_material_flag boolean [note: 'True if the shipment contains hazardous chemicals subject to DOT 49 CFR.']
  hs_code varchar [note: 'Six- to ten-digit code that classifies the goods for customs duties and statistical purposes.']
  import_permit_reference varchar [note: 'Reference number of the import permit required for regulated chemicals.']
  incoterms varchar [note: 'Standard trade term defining responsibility for costs, risks, and logistics between seller and buyer.']
  is_lcl boolean [note: 'True if the shipment is less than a full container load (LCL).']
  number_of_packages varchar [note: 'Count of individual packages or containers in the shipment.']
  package_type varchar [note: 'Standard packaging type used for the shipment.']
  reach_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the chemical product complies with EU REACH regulations (true = compliant).']
  regulatory_agency varchar [note: 'Name of the regulatory authority overseeing the customs process (e.g., CBP, EPA).']
  tariff_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Applicable tariff rate expressed as a percentage of the declared value.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Primary mode of transport used for the shipment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the customs declaration record.']
  volume_m3 decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total cubic volume of the shipment in cubic meters.']
  weight_kg decimal(12,3) [note: 'Gross weight of the shipment in kilograms.']

  Note: 'Export or import customs declaration for international chemical shipments. Records declaration type (export/import), HS tariff code, country of origin, declared value, currency, Incoterms, export control classification number (ECCN), REACH compliance flag, import permit reference, customs broker details, and clearance status. Required for cross-border movement of chemicals under TSCA, REACH, and national customs regulations.'
}

Table logistics.freight_claim {
  freight_claim_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the freight claim record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Claims must be attributed to the responsible customer account for liability tracking and regulatory reporting.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the carrier responsible for the shipment.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the chemical product that was affected by the incident.']
  claimant_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: REQUIRED: Tracking the internal employee who files a freight claim supports accountability, audit trails, and internal cost recovery processes.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Freight claim reimbursements are charged back to the cost center that incurred the loss.']
  experimental_formulation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.experimental_formulation. Business justification: Loss or damage claims on experimental material must reference the specific formulation to assess impact on R&D outcomes.']
  invoice_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.invoice. Business justification: Freight claim resolution must reference the original invoice to reconcile claim amount against billed freight.']
  material_master_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to rawmaterial.material_master. Business justification: Freight Claim processing for damaged or lost goods needs the material master to identify the product, its regulatory status, and traceability for reporting.']
  profit_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.profit_center. Business justification: Profitability impact of freight claims is tracked against the profit center responsible for the shipment.']
  shipment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the shipment to which this claim relates.']
  bill_of_lading_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the Bill of Lading for the shipment.']
  carrier_response_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the carrier\'s response to the claim.']
  cas_number varchar [note: 'Unique CAS registry number identifying the chemical substance.']
  claim_amount_adjustments decimal(18,2) [note: 'Sum of adjustments, fees, or deductions applied to the claim.']
  claim_amount_gross decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total claimed amount before any adjustments.']
  claim_amount_net decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final claim amount after adjustments, representing the amount payable.']
  claim_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the claim amounts.']
  claim_filed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the claim was initially filed by the claimant.']
  claim_number varchar [note: 'External claim number assigned by the logistics team for tracking and reference.']
  claim_status varchar [note: 'Current processing state of the claim within the claims workflow.']
  claim_type varchar [note: 'Category of the claim describing the nature of the loss during transport.']
  claimant_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the party (shipper, customer, or internal unit) filing the claim.']
  hazard_class varchar [note: 'Regulatory hazard class of the chemical product per GHS/OSHA.']
  incident_country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the incident location.']
  incident_date date [note: 'Date on which the loss, damage, or other incident occurred during transport.']
  incident_location varchar [note: 'Physical address or site where the incident was reported.']
  loss_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the loss, damage, or contamination event.']
  lot_number varchar [note: 'Batch or lot number of the chemical product involved in the claim.']
  photos_attached_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether photographic evidence has been provided.']
  proof_of_delivery_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the Proof of Delivery document.']
  quantity_affected decimal(18,3) [note: 'Amount of product (in the unit specified) that was lost, damaged, or contaminated.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the claim record was first created in the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the claim record.']
  settlement_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Amount settled with the carrier after claim resolution.']
  settlement_date date [note: 'Date on which the settlement payment was made.']
  supporting_documents_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether supporting documentation (e.g., photos, BOL) has been attached to the claim.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Measurement unit for the quantity affected.']

  Note: 'Formal freight claim filed against a carrier for loss, damage, shortage, or contamination of chemical goods during transport. Records claim number, claim type, shipment reference, claimed amount, damage description, chemical product affected, supporting documentation (photos, BOL, POD), carrier response, settlement amount, and claim status. Tracks financial recovery and carrier liability for chemical cargo incidents.'
}

Table logistics.dock_appointment {
  dock_appointment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the dock appointment record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.account. Business justification: Dock appointment scheduling is often tied to a specific customer account for capacity planning and billing.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Dock appointment records carrier name/scac; carrier_id FK provides authoritative reference.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Dock appointment fees and handling charges are allocated to the cost center that scheduled the appointment.']
  driver_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: REQUIRED: Dock appointments must link to the certified driver employee to verify training, licensing, and safety compliance.']
  material_master_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to rawmaterial.material_master. Business justification: Dock Appointment scheduling for hazardous loads requires the material master to verify handling procedures and compliance, so a material_master_id FK ensures correct dock resource allocation.']
  parent_logistics_shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Dock appointment is scheduled for a particular shipment; the free‑text shipment_reference becomes redundant once the FK is added.']
  production_schedule_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to planning.production_schedule. Business justification: Dock Appointment Scheduling uses the Production Schedule to allocate dock slots for outbound loads.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: Dock scheduling for R&D material receipt is tied to the owning research project to coordinate lab readiness.']
  vehicle_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the vehicle (e.g., license plate or internal fleet number).']
  warehouse_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the plant or warehouse location where the dock appointment occurs.']
  work_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to production.work_center. Business justification: Dock scheduling ties appointments to the responsible production work center for loading coordination and labor planning.']
  appointment_date date [note: 'Calendar date on which the appointment is scheduled.']
  appointment_fee decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary charge associated with the dock appointment (e.g., dock usage fee).']
  appointment_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the appointment, used for tracking and communication.']
  appointment_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the appointment is for inbound (receiving) or outbound (shipping) freight.']
  check_in_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Actual time the carrier/check‑in event occurred at the dock.']
  check_out_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Actual time the carrier/check‑out event occurred at the dock.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the appointment record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the appointment fee.']
  dock_appointment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the appointment.']
  dock_door_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the dock door assigned to the appointment.']
  hazmat_class varchar [note: 'Hazard class of the material per DOT regulations. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: 1|2|3|4|5|6|9 — promote to reference product]']
  hazmat_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the shipment contains hazardous materials.']
  hazmat_pre_staging_required boolean [note: 'True if the hazardous material must be pre‑staged in a designated area before loading/unloading.']
  party_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the business party (shipper or receiver) associated with the appointment.']
  scheduled_end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Planned end date and time of the dock window.']
  scheduled_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Planned start date and time of the dock window.']
  segregation_area varchar [note: 'Designated dock or yard area where segregated hazardous material is handled.']
  segregation_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the appointment requires segregation of the material from other loads.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the appointment record.']
  wait_time_minutes varchar [note: 'Total minutes the carrier waited between scheduled start and actual check‑in.']

  Note: 'Scheduled loading or unloading appointment at a plant or warehouse dock for a specific chemical shipment or carrier. Records appointment date and time window, dock door assignment, carrier and driver details, shipment reference, appointment type (inbound/outbound), check-in and check-out timestamps, wait time, appointment status, and hazmat pre-staging requirements. Manages dock throughput, coordinates with SAP EWM for warehouse execution, and ensures proper hazmat segregation at dock level per DOT 49 CFR §177.848 segregation and separation requirements.'
}

Table logistics.vehicle {
  vehicle_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each vehicle or transport equipment record.']
  driver_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: REQUIRED: Assigning a primary driver to each vehicle enables fleet management, driver‑vehicle audit trails, and regulatory safety checks.']
  annual_inspection_due_date date [note: 'Scheduled date by which the next annual DOT inspection must be completed.']
  cleaning_certification_date date [note: 'Date when the vehicle received its most recent cleaning certification for cross‑contamination prevention.']
  cleaning_certification_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the vehicle\'s cleaning certification.']
  compliance_documentation_status varchar [note: 'Overall status of required regulatory documentation for the vehicle.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the vehicle record was first created in the data lake.']
  cross_contamination_prevention boolean [note: 'Indicates whether cleaning procedures have been completed to prevent cross‑contamination before the next load.']
  dedicated boolean [note: 'True if the vehicle is dedicated to a single customer or product line; false if shared.']
  emission_class varchar [note: 'Regulatory emission classification (e.g., Euro6, EPA Tier 4).']
  fuel_type varchar [note: 'Primary fuel used by the vehicle.']
  gps_enabled boolean [note: 'True if the vehicle is equipped with active GPS tracking.']
  gps_last_update timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent GPS location transmission.']
  gps_latitude double [note: 'Most recent latitude coordinate reported by the vehicle\'s GPS.']
  gps_longitude double [note: 'Most recent longitude coordinate reported by the vehicle\'s GPS.']
  hazmat_placard_capability boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the vehicle is equipped and approved to display DOT hazmat placards.']
  inspection_status varchar [note: 'Result of the most recent inspection.']
  insurance_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the vehicle\'s insurance coverage expires.']
  insurance_policy_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the liability insurance policy covering the vehicle.']
  last_cargo_code varchar [note: 'CAS or internal product code of the most recent cargo carried, used for contamination tracking.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent DOT‑required safety inspection.']
  license_plate varchar [note: 'State‑issued license plate identifier.']
  maintenance_cycle_km decimal(10,2) [note: 'Mileage interval after which scheduled maintenance is required.']
  manufacturer varchar [note: 'Company that manufactured the vehicle.']
  max_payload_kg decimal(10,2) [note: 'Maximum allowable cargo weight for the vehicle.']
  model varchar [note: 'Model designation of the vehicle.']
  next_maintenance_date date [note: 'Planned date for the next preventive maintenance activity.']
  odometer_km decimal(10,2) [note: 'Cumulative distance traveled by the vehicle.']
  registration_number varchar [note: 'U.S. Department of Transportation registration identifier for the vehicle.']
  tare_weight_kg decimal(10,2) [note: 'Weight of the empty vehicle without cargo.']
  temperature_control_capability boolean [note: 'True if the vehicle can maintain a controlled temperature environment for temperature‑sensitive chemicals.']
  temperature_max_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Highest temperature the vehicle can maintain when temperature control is enabled.']
  temperature_min_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Lowest temperature the vehicle can maintain when temperature control is enabled.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the vehicle record.']
  vehicle_code varchar [note: 'Internal alphanumeric code used to reference the vehicle within the enterprise system.']
  vehicle_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or designation for the vehicle (e.g., "West Coast Tanker 12").']
  vehicle_status varchar [note: 'Current operational state of the vehicle.']
  vehicle_type varchar [note: 'Category of transport equipment, aligned with DOT hazardous‑material classifications.']
  vin_number varchar [note: 'Globally unique identifier assigned by the vehicle manufacturer.']
  year_of_manufacture varchar [note: 'Calendar year the vehicle was built.']

  Note: 'Master record for vehicles and transport equipment used in chemical product logistics, including owned fleet assets and carrier-provided equipment. Stores vehicle ID, vehicle type (tanker, flatbed, dry van, ISO container, railcar, IBC chassis), license plate or equipment number, DOT registration number, hazmat placard capability per DOT 49 CFR §172.500-§172.560, last inspection date, annual DOT inspection status per 49 CFR §396.17, temperature control capability and range, dedicated/non-dedicated status, last cargo carried (for contamination prevention), cleaning certification date, tare weight, and maximum payload. Supports equipment assignment, DOT compliance tracking, and chemical cross-contamination prevention through last-cargo verification.'
}

Table logistics.carrier_qualification {
  carrier_qualification_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the carrier_qualification association']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the carrier']
  material_master_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the material master']
  qualification_status varchar [note: 'Current qualification status (e.g., Approved, Pending, Revoked)']

  Note: 'Represents the qualification relationship between a raw material and a freight carrier. Each record captures the status and date of qualification for a specific material-carrier pair.. Existence Justification: A material can be qualified with multiple approved carriers, and each carrier can be qualified for multiple materials. The qualification status and date are managed as a distinct business process, with humans creating, updating, and retiring these records.'
}

Table logistics.carrier_pricing_agreement {
  carrier_pricing_agreement_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for the CarrierPricingAgreement association']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to the carrier master record']
  contract_number varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the carrier‑price‑list contract']
  effective_from date [note: 'Start date of the contract\'s validity']
  effective_to date [note: 'End date of the contract\'s validity (null if open‑ended)']

  Note: 'Represents the contractual agreement between a freight carrier and a price list. Each record links one carrier to one price list and stores contract‑specific data such as contract number and validity period.. Existence Justification: Carriers negotiate distinct pricing agreements (price lists) that are valid for specific periods. A single carrier can have multiple active price‑list contracts, and a single price list can be applied to multiple carriers. The business tracks each contract with its own contract number and effective dates, making the relationship an operational M:N entity.'
}

  termination_date date [note: 'Date when the party relationship was terminated, if applicable.']
  time_zone varchar [note: 'IANA time zone identifier for the party\'s primary location.']
  trade_name varchar [note: 'Commonly used name or brand of the party.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the party record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for party. Referenced by receiver_party_id.'
}

Table logistics.loading_dock {
  loading_dock_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for loading_dock']
  paired_loading_dock_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on loading_dock (paired_loading_dock_id)']
  access_control_method varchar [note: 'Mechanism used to control entry to the dock area.']
  address_line varchar [note: 'Street address of the loading dock facility.']
  capacity_volume_m3 decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum cargo volume the dock can accommodate, in cubic meters.']
  capacity_weight_kg decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum gross weight the dock can support, in kilograms.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the dock is located.']
  code varchar [note: 'Unique alphanumeric code used in operational systems to reference the dock.']
  country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code where the dock resides.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the dock record was first created.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the dock, including any special notes.']
  dock_leveler_type varchar [note: 'Type of dock leveler installed.']
  dot_compliance boolean [note: 'True when the dock meets Department of Transportation 49 CFR requirements.']
  gps_accuracy_m double [note: 'Estimated positional accuracy of the GPS coordinates, in meters.']
  hazardous_material_capable boolean [note: 'Indicates if the dock is approved for hazardous material handling (DOT 49 CFR).']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent safety/operational inspection.']
  latitude double [note: 'Geographic latitude of the dock (decimal degrees).']
  longitude double [note: 'Geographic longitude of the dock (decimal degrees).']
  manager_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for the dock manager.']
  manager_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the person responsible for dock operations.']
  manager_phone varchar [note: 'Primary contact phone number for the dock manager.']
  max_vehicle_height_m decimal(8,2) [note: 'Maximum vehicle height that can be accommodated.']
  max_vehicle_length_m decimal(8,2) [note: 'Longest vehicle length that can be accommodated.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the loading dock.']
  next_inspection_due date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next required inspection.']
  operating_hours varchar [note: 'Standard daily operating window (e.g., 08:00-17:00).']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal code for the dock address.']
  power_available boolean [note: 'Indicates whether electrical power is supplied at the dock.']
  safety_certification varchar [note: 'Safety certification held by the dock facility.']
  security_level varchar [note: 'Security classification of the dock facility.']
  shift_schedule varchar [note: 'Number of work shifts the dock operates per day.']
  state varchar [note: 'State or province of the dock location.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the dock.']
  temperature_control boolean [note: 'True if the dock area has temperature regulation.']
  type varchar [note: 'Category of dock based on physical configuration.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the dock record.']
  water_available boolean [note: 'Indicates whether water service is available at the dock.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for loading_dock. Referenced by loading_dock_id.'
}

Table billing.invoice {
  invoice_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the invoice record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customer billed on this invoice.']
  created_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: SOX audit requires tracking which employee created each invoice; finance teams record creator for compliance.']
  emission_source_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ehs.emission_source. Business justification: Required: Monitoring services for specific emission sources are billed; the FK connects the invoice to the emission source being serviced.']
  ip_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to formulation.ip_record. Business justification: Royalty invoicing depends on the IP record that underlies the sold formulation; linking enables accurate royalty calculation.']
  journal_entry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.journal_entry. Business justification: Required for posting each invoice as a revenue journal entry; finance uses journal_entry for GAAP revenue recognition, a standard process in chemical manufacturing.']
  manufacturing_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to production.manufacturing_order. Business justification: Invoice generation is based on a specific manufacturing order; required for order‑to‑cash reporting and traceability of sold product.']
  operating_permit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ehs.operating_permit. Business justification: Required: Permit fees are invoiced; linking an invoice to the operating permit records the fee source and supports compliance reporting.']
  opportunity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.opportunity. Business justification: Needed for Opportunity‑to‑Invoice conversion metrics used in pipeline performance dashboards.']
  outbound_delivery_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the delivery/shipment associated with the invoice.']
  price_list_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list. Business justification: INVOICE generation uses the selected price list to calculate line prices; finance reports require linking each invoice to its price list.']
  product_order_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the sales order that generated this invoice.']
  production_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to planning.production_plan. Business justification: Required for linking each invoice to the specific production plan that generated the shipped product, enabling cost allocation, ASC 606 revenue recognition, and plant performance reporting.']
  purchase_order_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the purchase order from the customer, if applicable.']
  quote_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.quote. Business justification: Required for Quote‑to‑Invoice conversion tracking report, essential for sales effectiveness and compliance.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: Contract research invoices must reference the specific R&D project for revenue allocation and client billing reports.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.vendor. Business justification: Vendor invoice reconciliation and vendor statement generation require linking each invoice directly to the supplying vendor (standard ERP practice).']
  waste_stream_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ehs.waste_stream. Business justification: Required: Customers are charged per waste stream disposal; linking invoices to waste streams enables detailed billing and waste tracking.']
  work_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.work_order. Business justification: Maintenance Chargeback Invoice Generation: each work order that incurs service costs is billed via an invoice referencing the originating work_order.']
  billing_address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the billing address for the customer.']
  billing_address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the billing address.']
  billing_city varchar [note: 'City component of the billing address.']
  billing_country varchar [note: 'Country code of the billing address (ISO 3166-1 alpha-3).']
  billing_postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal code of the billing address.']
  billing_state varchar [note: 'State or province of the billing address.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free-text comments or notes attached to the invoice.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the invoice record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the invoice amounts.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total discount granted on the invoice.']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which payment is expected according to payment terms.']
  external_reference_number varchar [note: 'Reference number from external systems (e.g., EDI, third-party billing).']
  gross_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount before taxes, discounts, and other adjustments.']
  invoice_date date [note: 'Date the invoice was issued to the customer.']
  invoice_number varchar [note: 'External business identifier assigned to the invoice, visible to customers.']
  invoice_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the invoice.']
  invoice_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the invoice document.']
  is_electronic_invoice boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the invoice was issued electronically (e-invoice).']
  is_tax_exempt boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the invoice is exempt from tax.']
  last_payment_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent payment applied to this invoice.']
  net_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final amount payable after taxes and discounts.']
  payment_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the payment was made.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Method used for the payment transaction.']
  payment_status varchar [note: 'Current status of payment against the invoice.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Terms defining when payment is due, e.g., Net 30.']
  rebate_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Amount of any rebate applied to the invoice.']
  regulatory_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Compliance status of the invoice with chemical industry regulations (e.g., REACH, GHS).']
  settlement_status varchar [note: 'Status of the invoice settlement process.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total tax applied to the invoice.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the tax jurisdiction and rate applied.']
  tax_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Applicable tax rate percentage for the invoice.']
  total_quantity decimal(18,3) [note: 'Aggregate quantity of goods billed on the invoice.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the invoice record.']
  volume_m3 decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total volume of goods invoiced, expressed in cubic meters.']
  weight_kg decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total weight of goods invoiced, expressed in kilograms.']

  Note: 'Core billing document representing a customer invoice generated from a sales order or delivery. Captures invoice number, billing date, customer account, total amount, currency, payment terms, tax totals, and lifecycle status (open, partially paid, cleared, disputed). Serves as the primary accounts receivable document and SSOT for all customer-facing billing transactions in the chemical manufacturing order-to-cash cycle. Links to invoice_line for item detail and to payment_receipt for cash application.'
}

Table billing.invoice_line {
  invoice_line_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for each invoice line record.']
  batch_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to production.batch_record. Business justification: Regulatory and quality compliance demand linking each invoiced line to the exact production batch that supplied the material.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: Needed for cost and compliance reporting to map each invoice line to the underlying chemical product, supporting GHS classification and REACH reporting.']
  experimental_formulation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.experimental_formulation. Business justification: Custom formulation sales need traceability; each invoice line for a formulation references the experimental formulation record.']
  formula_version_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to formulation.formula_version. Business justification: Regulatory traceability report requires each sold line item to reference the exact formula version used in production.']
  gl_account_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.gl_account. Business justification: Each invoice line posts to a specific GL account for product revenue; linking enables line‑level GL reporting required for statutory and internal financial statements.']
  invoice_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the parent invoice header to which this line belongs.']
  line_item_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to order.line_item. Business justification: Required for audit and compliance: links each invoice line to its originating order line to support revenue recognition, traceability, and regulatory reporting.']
  material_master_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to rawmaterial.material_master. Business justification: COGS allocation: invoice lines must reference the raw material consumed for each sold product to support cost accounting and regulatory reporting (e.g., REACH cost tracking).']
  po_line_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.po_line. Business justification: Three‑way match process matches invoice lines to PO lines to ensure pricing and quantity accuracy; a direct FK is essential for this control.']
  price_agreement_line_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.price_agreement_line. Business justification: Ensures invoiced pricing aligns with agreed price‑agreement terms, required for rebate and audit reports.']
  price_list_item_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to pricing.price_list_item. Business justification: Each invoice line is priced from a specific price‑list item; audit trails need the exact price list item reference.']
  quote_line_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.quote_line. Business justification: Supports line‑level audit of invoiced items versus quoted items for pricing compliance.']
  sku_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.sku. Business justification: Required for the invoicing process to associate each line item with the exact SKU sold, enabling inventory tracking, pricing, and regulatory reporting.']
  work_order_operation_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.work_order_operation. Business justification: Detailed Maintenance Billing Line Items: invoice lines map to specific work order operations to itemize labor and material costs.']
  accounting_date date [note: 'Fiscal date used for posting the line to the ledger.']
  cost_center varchar [note: 'Internal cost center to which the expense of this line is charged.']
  cost_element varchar [note: 'Cost element identifier for detailed cost accounting.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the invoice line record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the monetary values on this line.']
  discount_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Total discount value applied to this line before tax.']
  exchange_rate decimal(12,6) [note: 'Rate used to convert the line amount to the corporate reporting currency.']
  expiry_date date [note: 'Expiration date of the batch/lot, if applicable.']
  gl_account varchar [note: 'GL account number used for posting the line\'s financial impact.']
  hazardous_material_flag boolean [note: 'True if the product is classified as hazardous under regulatory standards.']
  intercompany_flag boolean [note: 'True if the line is part of an intercompany billing arrangement.']
  intercompany_invoice_number varchar [note: 'Reference number of the corresponding intercompany invoice.']
  line_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Gross monetary amount for the line (quantity × unit_price).']
  line_number varchar [note: 'Sequential number of the line within the invoice for ordering.']
  line_status varchar [note: 'Operational status of the line (e.g., open, closed, cancelled).']
  manufacturing_site varchar [note: 'Plant or site where the product batch was produced.']
  net_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Net amount after tax and discount (line_amount + tax_amount – discount_amount).']
  plant varchar [note: 'SAP plant code representing the production location.']
  price_override_flag boolean [note: 'True if the unit price was manually overridden.']
  price_override_reason varchar [note: 'Explanation for why the unit price was overridden.']
  product_description varchar [note: 'Human‑readable description of the product or service.']
  profit_center varchar [note: 'Profit center responsible for the revenue generated by this line.']
  quantity decimal(18,4) [note: 'Amount of product or service delivered, expressed in the unit of measure.']
  rebate_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Monetary value of the rebate applied to this line.']
  rebate_flag boolean [note: 'True if a rebate applies to this line.']
  regulatory_compliance_code varchar [note: 'Code indicating applicable regulatory requirements (e.g., REACH, GHS) for the product.']
  revenue_recognition_date date [note: 'Date on which revenue for this line is recognized per accounting policy.']
  settlement_date date [note: 'Date when the line was settled with the customer.']
  settlement_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the financial settlement for this line.']
  special_handling_instructions varchar [note: 'Any special handling or shipping instructions for the line item.']
  tax_amount decimal(18,4) [note: 'Monetary tax amount calculated for this line.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Tax classification code applied to this line (e.g., VAT, GST).']
  tax_exempt_flag boolean [note: 'True if the line is exempt from tax.']
  unit_price decimal(18,4) [note: 'Price per unit of the product before taxes, discounts, or rebates.']
  uom varchar [note: 'Standard unit of measure for the quantity (e.g., kilograms, liters, pieces).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the invoice line record.']

  Note: 'Line-item detail of a customer invoice representing individual chemical products, formulations, or services billed. Captures material number, product description, quantity, unit of measure, unit price, line amount, tax code, cost center, and profit center. Supports detailed revenue recognition and COGS allocation per product SKU and batch lot in SAP FI/CO.'
}

Table billing.billing_adjustment {
  billing_adjustment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for adjustment']
  approved_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Finance adjustment approvals are performed by specific employees; linking supports approval trail and regulatory reporting.']
  formula_change_request_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to formulation.formula_change_request. Business justification: When a formula change alters product cost, a credit memo is issued; linking to the change request enables audit of price adjustments.']
  journal_entry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.journal_entry. Business justification: Adjustments (credits/debits) must be recorded in a journal entry for audit trail; finance requires this link for adjustment posting.']
  material_master_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to rawmaterial.material_master. Business justification: Quality‑related credit memos: adjustments due to material defects need a link to the specific material master for audit trails and compliance investigations.']
  party_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customer to whom the adjustment applies.']
  reference_invoice_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the original invoice that is being adjusted.']
  related_adjustment_billing_adjustment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the original adjustment that this record reverses or amends.']
  safety_incident_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ehs.safety_incident. Business justification: Required: Credit memos are issued for costs arising from safety incidents; the FK ties adjustments to the originating incident for traceability.']
  work_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.work_order. Business justification: Work Order Credit Memo Adjustment: adjustments (credits) are issued to correct charges generated by a specific work order.']
  accounting_period varchar [note: 'Fiscal period (e.g., 2023Q4) to which the adjustment is posted.']
  adjustment_number varchar [note: 'Business-visible document number assigned to the adjustment (e.g., CM-202300123).']
  adjustment_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the adjustment reduces (credit) or increases (debit) the amount owed.']
  amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary amount of the adjustment before tax calculations.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current approval state of the adjustment.']
  approved_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who approved the adjustment.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the adjustment was approved.']
  billing_adjustment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the adjustment document.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form notes entered by users.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Accounting cost center associated with the adjustment.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the adjustment record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the monetary values.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date on which the adjustment becomes effective for accounting purposes.']
  external_reference varchar [note: 'Reference identifier from an external system (e.g., ERP, EDI).']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Method used for any associated payment or surcharge.']
  posted_by varchar [note: 'Identifier of the user who posted the adjustment.']
  posted_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact timestamp when the adjustment was posted to the ledger.']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date the adjustment was posted to the general ledger.']
  reason_code varchar [note: 'Standardized code representing the business reason for the adjustment (e.g., RETURN, PRICE_CORRECTION).']
  reason_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description providing details of why the adjustment was issued.']
  reversal_flag boolean [note: 'True if this adjustment reverses a previous adjustment.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system that originated the adjustment record (e.g., SAP_SD).']
  tax_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax component associated with the adjustment amount.']
  tax_category varchar [note: 'Classification of tax treatment for the adjustment.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Code that determines the tax rate and rules applied to the adjustment.']
  tax_exempt_flag boolean [note: 'True if the adjustment is exempt from tax.']
  tax_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Applicable tax rate expressed as a percentage (e.g., 7.25).']
  total_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Net monetary impact of the adjustment after tax (adjustment_amount + tax_amount).']
  transaction_timestamp timestamp [note: 'The moment the adjustment was executed (e.g., when the credit memo was posted).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent modification to the adjustment record.']

  Note: 'Financial adjustment document issued to a customer to either reduce (credit) or increase (debit) the amount owed on an existing invoice. Credit scenarios include product returns, quality disputes (OOS/OOT), pricing corrections, or volume rebate settlements. Debit scenarios include underbilling corrections, surcharges, freight adjustments, or hazardous material handling fees. Captures adjustment document number, adjustment type (credit/debit), reference invoice, reason code, adjustment amount, tax impact, and approval workflow status. Serves as the SSOT for all post-invoice billing modifications in the chemical manufacturing order-to-cash cycle. Managed in SAP SD/FI as billing document types.'
}

Table billing.payment_receipt {
  payment_receipt_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the payment receipt record.']
  account_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the customer who made the payment.']
  invoice_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the accounts‑receivable invoice to which this payment is applied.']
  journal_entry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.journal_entry. Business justification: Payment receipts generate cash‑receipt journal entries; the link supports cash application and reconciliation reports mandated by finance.']
  opportunity_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to sales.opportunity. Business justification: Tracks payments against originating sales opportunities for cash‑flow analysis and commission calculations.']
  processed_by_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Receipt processing audit needs employee identifier to trace who recorded payments for internal controls.']
  product_order_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the sales order that generated the invoiced amount.']
  work_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.work_order. Business justification: Work Order Settlement Receipt: receipts are recorded against the work order whose costs are being settled.']
  amount_discount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Discounts or rebates applied to the gross amount.']
  amount_gross decimal(18,2) [note: 'Total amount received before any deductions.']
  amount_net decimal(18,2) [note: 'Final amount after tax and discount adjustments; the amount posted to accounts receivable.']
  amount_tax decimal(18,2) [note: 'Tax component deducted from the gross amount, if applicable.']
  bank_account_number varchar [note: 'Account number of the payer\'s bank used for the transaction.']
  bank_name varchar [note: 'Name of the financial institution that processed the payment.']
  bank_routing_number varchar [note: 'Routing/ABA number identifying the payer\'s bank.']
  check_number varchar [note: 'Number on the check, if payment method is check.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the payment receipt record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency in which the payment was made.']
  exchange_rate decimal(18,6) [note: 'Rate used to convert foreign currency amount to the functional currency, if applicable.']
  foreign_currency_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Payment amount expressed in the original foreign currency before conversion.']
  is_advance_payment boolean [note: 'True if the payment is an advance against future goods or services.']
  is_refund boolean [note: 'True if the payment represents a refund to the customer.']
  payer_identifier varchar [note: 'Tax ID, DUNS, or other identifier for the payer used for compliance.']
  payer_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the individual or organization making the payment.']
  payment_channel varchar [note: 'Channel through which the payment was submitted (online portal, mobile app, branch, or mail).']
  payment_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form text describing the purpose or notes for the payment.']
  payment_method varchar [note: 'Instrument used to transfer funds (e.g., wire, ACH, check, credit card, cash).']
  payment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the payment receipt.']
  payment_terms varchar [note: 'Terms governing the payment (e.g., Net 30, Due on receipt).']
  payment_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date and time when the payment was received and recorded.']
  receipt_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the receipt, used for external reference and audit.']
  reconciliation_status varchar [note: 'Result of matching the payment to open invoices.']
  settlement_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the settlement batch that includes this payment.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Name of the source system that generated the payment record (e.g., SAP FI, external bank feed).']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the tax jurisdiction or rule applied to the payment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the payment receipt record.']

  Note: 'Record of a customer payment received against an open accounts receivable invoice. Captures payment document number, payment date, payment method (wire, ACH, check), amount received, currency, bank clearing reference, and allocation to specific invoices. Supports payment reconciliation and AR aging in SAP FI.'
}

Table billing.ar_open_item {
  ar_open_item_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the open AR item.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: AR aging reports are often broken out by cost center; linking open items to cost_center enables cost‑center level DSO analysis.']
  invoice_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the source invoice in SAP FI.']
  primary_ar_account_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the customer in the master data system.']
  aging_bucket varchar [note: 'Categorized aging range used for collection reporting.']
  amount_original decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount originally invoiced before any payments, discounts, or adjustments.']
  amount_outstanding decimal(15,2) [note: 'Remaining amount that has not been settled, including taxes and fees.']
  ar_open_item_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of the goods or services represented by the line.']
  collection_status varchar [note: 'Current state of collection activities for the open item.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the open‑item record was first created in the system.']
  credit_memo_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary value of the credit memo applied.']
  credit_memo_date date [note: 'Date the credit memo was issued.']
  credit_memo_flag boolean [note: 'True if a credit memo has been applied to offset this open item.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code of the transaction (e.g., USD, EUR).']
  discount_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary discount available if payment is made by the discount due date.']
  discount_due_date date [note: 'Last date on which the early‑payment discount can be claimed.']
  dispute_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary value currently under dispute.']
  dispute_flag boolean [note: 'True if the customer has raised a dispute on this item.']
  dispute_reason varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of why the customer disputes the charge.']
  due_date date [note: 'Date by which payment is expected according to payment terms.']
  dunning_level varchar [note: 'Current dunning step applied to the overdue item, where higher numbers indicate more severe collection actions.']
  gross_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount including tax before any discounts or write‑offs.']
  last_payment_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent payment applied to the item.']
  overdue_days varchar [note: 'Number of days past the due date that the item remains unpaid.']
  partial_payment_flag boolean [note: 'True if one or more partial payments have been applied to the item.']
  payment_terms_code varchar [note: 'Code that defines the payment schedule and discount eligibility (e.g., NET30, 2%10).']
  posting_date date [note: 'Date the invoice was posted to the general ledger.']
  quantity varchar [note: 'Number of units or amount represented by this line (e.g., liters, kilograms).']
  reconciliation_date date [note: 'Date the item was reconciled with a payment.']
  reconciliation_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the open item has been matched to a payment.']
  tax_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total tax applied to the invoice line.']
  tax_code varchar [note: 'Code representing the tax jurisdiction and rate applied.']
