  risk_rank varchar [note: 'Overall risk ranking derived from likelihood and severity.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numerical risk ranking (likelihood × severity) expressed as a decimal.']
  safety_category varchar [note: 'Safety domain to which the node belongs.']
  severity varchar [note: 'Qualitative severity rating for the consequence.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the HAZOP node record.']

  Note: 'Individual HAZOP study node (process section or design intent) within a parent HAZOP study. Captures node identifier, process description, design intent, guide words applied (No, More, Less, Reverse, Other Than), identified deviations, causes, consequences, existing safeguards, risk ranking (likelihood × severity), and recommended actions. Provides granular PHA documentation required for OSHA PSM compliance and EPA RMP submissions.'
}

Table ehs.chemical_exposure_record {
  chemical_exposure_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for each chemical exposure monitoring record.']
  batch_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to production.batch_record. Business justification: Employee chemical exposure is evaluated per batch to assess health risk and comply with occupational safety regulations.']
  cas_registry_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier for the chemical substance being monitored.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: Employee exposure logs need the exact chemical product to drive health surveillance and OSHA recordkeeping.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the employee or worker whose exposure is being recorded.']
  formula_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to formulation.formula. Business justification: EXPOSURE MONITORING: Employee exposure records are tied to the specific formulation handled to assess product‑specific health risks.']
  functional_location_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.functional_location. Business justification: EXPOSURE MONITORING: Exposure records are tied to the location where sampling occurred; linking supports compliance reporting.']
  lot_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to inventory.lot. Business justification: Needed to associate employee exposure measurements with the exact production lot, supporting regulatory compliance and exposure tracking.']
  sampling_equipment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the equipment used for sampling (e.g., pump, sampler model).']
  sampling_point_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific location or point where the sample was taken.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.site. Business justification: Chemical exposure incidents are recorded per work site to satisfy OSHA/TSCA health‑safety reporting.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.vendor. Business justification: Exposure monitoring records the supplier of the chemical to assess supplier compliance, risk, and to trigger supplier‑specific corrective actions.']
  analytical_method varchar [note: 'Laboratory technique used to analyze the sample (e.g., GC‑MS, FTIR).']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'Lot or batch identifier associated with the sampled material, if applicable.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the exposure measurement complies with the referenced limit.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the exposure record was first entered into the system.']
  department varchar [note: 'Department or functional area where the employee works (e.g., Production, Maintenance).']
  employee_role varchar [note: 'Job role of the employee at the time of exposure (e.g., Operator, Maintenance Technician).']
  exceedance_flag boolean [note: 'True if measured concentration exceeds the regulatory limit.']
  exposure_category varchar [note: 'Primary route of exposure for the chemical.']
  exposure_duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Length of time the employee was potentially exposed during the sampling interval.']
  exposure_source varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the source of the chemical (e.g., vent, process line).']
  exposure_status varchar [note: 'Overall status of the exposure event based on measurement and limits.']
  exposure_type varchar [note: 'Method used to collect the exposure data: personal air sampling, area monitoring, or biological monitoring.']
  follow_up_action varchar [note: 'Prescribed corrective or preventive action when an exceedance occurs.']
  limit_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of the regulatory limit value.']
  limit_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Applicable occupational exposure limit (e.g., OSHA PEL or ACGIH TLV) for the chemical.']
  measurement_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Exact date and time when the exposure measurement was taken.']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of the measured concentration (parts per million, milligrams per cubic meter, micrograms per cubic meter).']
  measurement_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Numeric result of the exposure measurement.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional observations, comments, or contextual information captured by the sampler.']
  plant_location varchar [note: 'Name of the manufacturing plant or site where the exposure sampling occurred.']
  ppe_used boolean [note: 'Indicates whether appropriate PPE was worn during sampling.']
  record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the record.']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific regulation or guideline (e.g., OSHA PEL, ACGIH TLV) that applies.']
  risk_category varchar [note: 'Risk classification derived from exposure level and job function.']
  sampling_date date [note: 'Calendar date on which the sample was collected.']
  shift varchar [note: 'Work shift during which the exposure occurred.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent modification to the record.']

  Note: 'Occupational chemical exposure monitoring record for workers at Chemical Mfg facilities. Captures employee or job role, chemical substance (CAS number), exposure measurement type (personal air sampling, area monitoring, biological monitoring), measured concentration (PPM, mg/m³), OSHA PEL/ACGIH TLV threshold, exceedance flag, sampling date, analytical method, and required follow-up actions. Supports OSHA 1910.1000 air contaminants compliance and industrial hygiene programs.'
}

Table ehs.emission_event {
  emission_event_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each emission event record.']
  cas_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to rawmaterial.cas_registry. Business justification: Emission reporting links each pollutant to its CAS registry entry for regulatory reporting and inventory reconciliation.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: Emission tracking ties each pollutant to its chemical product for EPA TRI and permit compliance.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Assigns emission monitoring and mitigation costs to the cost center responsible for the emission source.']
  emission_source_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ehs.emission_source. Business justification: Each emission event originates from a specific emission source. Adding emission_source_id to emission_event provides a clear parent relationship.']
  equipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.equipment. Business justification: EMISSIONS TRACKING: Emission events are typically generated by a specific piece of equipment; linking enables source‑based reporting.']
  formula_version_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to formulation.formula_version. Business justification: EMISSIONS ACCOUNTING: Emission events are reported per formula version to link emissions data to the exact product batch specifications.']
  invoice_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.invoice. Business justification: Required: Emission fees are billed to customers; linking emission events to the corresponding invoice supports fee calculation and regulatory reporting.']
  logistics_shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Transport Emission Tracking associates emission events with the corresponding shipment to calculate greenhouse‑gas inventory for regulatory compliance.']
  manufacturing_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to production.manufacturing_order. Business justification: Regulatory emission reports are generated per production order; linking emissions to the order enables accurate tracking and compliance.']
  product_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to order.order. Business justification: Emission reporting per production batch is allocated to the originating sales order to satisfy environmental permits and internal cost accounting.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: Pilot‑scale emissions must be reported per project to satisfy environmental permits and internal project KPIs.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.site. Business justification: Regulatory emission reports must be tied to the specific customer site where the release occurred (EPA reporting).']
  cause_of_release varchar [note: 'Primary cause that triggered the emission event.']
  cleanup_status varchar [note: 'Status of any remediation or cleanup activities.']
  containment_success_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether containment measures successfully prevented further release.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the emission event record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the emission data passed quality checks.']
  data_quality_notes varchar [note: 'Comments on data quality issues or anomalies.']
  emergency_response_action varchar [note: 'Description of emergency response actions taken after the event.']
  emission_category varchar [note: 'Classification of emission as point source, fugitive, or accidental.']
  emission_event_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the emission event record.']
  emission_factor decimal(20,5) [note: 'Factor used to estimate emissions when direct measurement is unavailable.']
  emission_factor_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of the emission factor (e.g., kg/ton).']
  emission_quantity decimal(20,5) [note: 'Measured amount of pollutant released during the event.']
  emission_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the emission quantity.']
  event_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the emission event was observed or recorded.']
  event_type varchar [note: 'Category of the emission event such as routine monitoring, accidental release, or spill.']
  facility_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the plant or facility where the emission occurred.']
  geographic_region varchar [note: 'State or region code where the emission source is located.']
  latitude double [note: 'Geographic latitude of the emission source.']
  longitude double [note: 'Geographic longitude of the emission source.']
  measurement_method varchar [note: 'Method used to determine the emission quantity.']
  monitoring_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the emission source is monitored.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional comments or observations.']
  regulatory_permit_number varchar [note: 'Permit identifier governing the emission source.']
  release_media varchar [note: 'Environmental medium into which the pollutant was released.']
  report_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the regulatory report.']
  report_submission_date date [note: 'Date the emission report was submitted to the regulator.']
  reportable_flag boolean [note: 'True if the emission event meets regulatory reporting thresholds.']
  reporting_requirement varchar [note: 'Regulatory reporting framework applicable (e.g., EPA 40 CFR 302, TRI).']
  source_permit_limit decimal(20,5) [note: 'Regulatory emission limit for the source.']
  source_permit_limit_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of the permit limit (e.g., kg/year).']
  source_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the emission source (e.g., stack, vent, tank) that generated the event.']
  source_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the physical source of the emission.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the emission event record.']

  Note: 'Comprehensive environmental emissions, releases, and source inventory record for Chemical Mfg facilities. Source inventory: all permitted and tracked emission sources (stacks, vents, fugitive equipment components, storage tanks, wastewater treatment units), source type, associated process unit, geographic coordinates, permit reference, applicable emission limits, control device linkage, monitoring frequency. Routine emissions: point-source and fugitive release quantities of VOCs, HAPs, GHGs, pollutant CAS numbers, emission factors, measurement methods (CEMS, stack test, engineering estimate). Accidental releases/spills: release date/time, chemical identity, quantity released, release media (air, soil, water, drain), cause, containment effectiveness, emergency response actions, regulatory reportability (CERCLA RQ, EPCRA 304, state spill reporting), agency notifications, cleanup status. Feeds TRI annual reporting, EPA air permit compliance, NPDES reporting, and spill notification workflows.'
}

Table ehs.emission_source {
  emission_source_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the emission source record.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: Permits for emission sources are tied to the specific chemical emitted, supporting permit management and reporting.']
  control_device_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the pollution control device linked to the source (e.g., scrubber, baghouse).']
  operating_permit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ehs.operating_permit. Business justification: An emission source is governed by a single operating permit; many sources can share a permit. Adding operating_permit_id to emission_source creates the required inbound link.']
  process_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the production unit or line associated with the emission source.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.site. Business justification: Each emission source permit is owned by a plant/site; linking enables site‑level permit inventory and compliance dashboards.']
  capacity_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the source capacity.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the emission source record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_flag varchar [note: 'Indicator of the confidence level in the reported measurement data.']
  emission_factor decimal(12,6) [note: 'Factor used to calculate emissions from process activity (e.g., kg pollutant per ton product).']
  emission_factor_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of the emission factor.']
  emission_limit_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the emission limit (e.g., kilograms per hour).']
  emission_limit_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Maximum allowable emission quantity for the source per reporting period.']
  emission_medium varchar [note: 'Environmental medium to which emissions are released.']
  emission_source_description varchar [note: 'Detailed free‑text description of the emission source, its function, and any special characteristics.']
  facility_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the plant or site where the emission source is located.']
  is_area_source boolean [note: 'True if emissions are dispersed over an area rather than a single point.']
  is_controlled boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the source has an attached emissions control device.']
  is_fugitive boolean [note: 'True if the source represents fugitive emissions (e.g., leaks, vents).']
  is_point_source boolean [note: 'True if emissions originate from a discrete point (e.g., stack).']
  is_reportable boolean [note: 'Flag indicating if the source is subject to regulatory reporting (e.g., EPA, TRI).']
  last_monitoring_date date [note: 'Date the most recent monitoring measurement was recorded.']
  latitude double [note: 'Geographic latitude of the emission source location in decimal degrees.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Lifecycle stage of the source within the enterprise asset management process.']
  location_description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of the source location (e.g., building, floor, area).']
  longitude double [note: 'Geographic longitude of the emission source location in decimal degrees.']
  measurement_method varchar [note: 'Method used to obtain emission measurements.']
  monitoring_frequency varchar [note: 'Required frequency for emission monitoring of the source.']
  next_monitoring_due date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next required monitoring activity.']
  permit_expiry_date date [note: 'Date the emission permit expires or must be renewed.']
  permit_issue_date date [note: 'Date the emission permit was issued.']
  permit_number varchar [note: 'Regulatory permit identifier authorizing the emission source.']
  reporting_category varchar [note: 'Regulatory framework(s) under which the source must be reported.']
  source_capacity decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum designed throughput or flow rate of the emission source.']
  source_code varchar [note: 'Business‑assigned alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the emission source within the enterprise.']
  source_group varchar [note: 'Logical grouping or classification of related emission sources (e.g., boiler cluster).']
  source_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the emission source as used in reports and dashboards.']
  source_operating_hours_per_year varchar [note: 'Total number of hours the source operates in a calendar year.']
  source_owner varchar [note: 'Organizational unit or department responsible for the emission source.']
  source_status varchar [note: 'Current operational status of the emission source.']
  source_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the source (e.g., stack, vent, fugitive equipment, storage tank, wastewater unit, process unit).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the emission source record.']

  Note: 'Master record for all permitted and tracked emission sources at Chemical Mfg facilities, including stacks, vents, fugitive equipment components, storage tanks, and wastewater treatment units. Captures source ID, source type, associated process unit, geographic coordinates, permit reference, applicable emission limits, control device linkage, and monitoring frequency requirements. Serves as the SSOT for emission source inventory used in air permit compliance and TRI reporting.'
}

Table ehs.waste_disposal_record {
  waste_disposal_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the waste disposal record.']
  carrier_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.carrier. Business justification: Waste Transport Carrier Compliance links waste disposal records to the carrier transporting waste, supporting RCRA reporting and carrier performance evaluation.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: Hazardous waste manifests must reference the disposed chemical product for RCRA reporting and cost allocation.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Assigns waste disposal expenses to the cost center that incurred the waste, supporting cost recovery and environmental compliance accounting.']
  formula_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to formulation.formula. Business justification: WASTE MANAGEMENT: Waste disposal records must identify the originating formula to track waste streams and compliance per product.']
  invoice_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to billing.invoice. Business justification: Required: Invoices are generated for waste disposal services per regulatory compliance; linking each waste record to its invoice enables accurate billing and audit trails.']
  logistics_shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Linking waste disposal records to the shipment enables traceability of hazardous waste movements for EPA tracking and internal audit.']
  lot_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to inventory.lot. Business justification: Links waste disposal entries to the originating lot for accurate hazardous waste reporting and traceability under EPA/REACH regulations.']
  manufacturing_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to production.manufacturing_order. Business justification: Waste disposal must be allocated to the specific manufacturing order that generated the waste for cost accounting and environmental compliance.']
  product_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to order.order. Business justification: Waste generated during order fulfillment must be linked to the order for waste‑cost tracking and regulatory disposal reporting.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: Waste generated during R&D trials is tracked against the responsible project for cost allocation and compliance.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.site. Business justification: Waste disposal records must be associated with the generating site for RCRA reporting and cost allocation.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.vendor. Business justification: Waste disposal contracts are managed with external waste‑hauler vendors; linking waste records to vendor enables cost tracking and regulatory compliance.']
  vendor_site_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.vendor_site. Business justification: Specific waste‑processing sites are vendor locations; associating each disposal record with the vendor site supports logistics and audit trails.']
  waste_stream_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the master waste‑stream definition describing the type of waste.']
  cost_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Monetary cost incurred for the waste disposal transaction.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the waste disposal record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for the disposal cost (e.g., USD, EUR).']
  disposal_facility_name varchar [note: 'Name of the licensed external facility where waste was sent.']
  disposal_method varchar [note: 'Method used to dispose of the waste.']
  disposal_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the waste disposal transaction, used for tracking and reporting.']
  disposal_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the waste was actually disposed of or shipped for disposal.']
  epa_waste_code varchar [note: 'EPA hazardous waste code (e.g., D001, F003) associated with the waste.']
  facility_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the internal plant or external facility that generated the waste.']
  hazardous_waste_classification varchar [note: 'Classification of waste for RCRA reporting purposes.']
  inspection_date date [note: 'Date the disposal site was inspected for compliance.']
  inspection_report_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the post‑disposal inspection or audit report.']
  land_disposal_restrictions_compliance boolean [note: 'Indicates compliance with Land Disposal Restrictions (true) or non‑compliance (false).']
  ldr_compliance_details varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of any LDR exemptions, variances, or special conditions.']
  manifest_number varchar [note: 'Unique EPA manifest identifier for the waste shipment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information or comments.']
  quantity decimal(18,4) [note: 'Amount of waste disposed, expressed in the unit indicated by quantity_unit.']
  quantity_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the disposed quantity (e.g., kilograms, pounds, gallons).']
  rcra_hazardous_flag boolean [note: 'True if the waste is classified as hazardous under RCRA regulations.']
  regulatory_notification_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether required regulatory agencies were notified (true) or not (false).']
  shipment_date date [note: 'Date the waste shipment left the generating facility.']
  transport_mode varchar [note: 'Mode of transportation used for the waste shipment.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the waste disposal record.']
  waste_batch_lot_number varchar [note: 'Lot or batch identifier associated with the waste generation batch.']
  waste_characteristics varchar [note: 'Physical and chemical description of the waste (e.g., liquid, solid, pH, VOC content).']
  waste_disposal_record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the waste disposal record.']
  waste_disposal_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the disposal was a single shipment, multiple shipments, or type unknown.']
  waste_generation_date date [note: 'Date the waste was generated at the facility.']
  waste_storage_location varchar [note: 'On‑site location where waste was stored prior to disposal.']

  Note: 'Comprehensive waste management record for Chemical Mfg operations covering waste stream master definitions, waste characterization, and individual disposal transactions. Waste stream master data: stream name, physical/chemical description, generating process unit, EPA waste codes, RCRA hazardous waste determination, typical generation rate, approved disposal methods, storage requirements, regulatory notification status. Disposal transaction data: waste characterization, quantity generated, disposal method (landfill, incineration, recycling, treatment), licensed disposal facility, manifest number, shipment date, chain-of-custody documentation, and LDR (Land Disposal Restrictions) compliance. Supports EPA RCRA hazardous waste reporting, biennial reporting, state environmental agency submissions, and ISO 14001 waste management tracking.'
}

Table ehs.waste_stream {
  waste_stream_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the waste stream.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: Waste stream classification depends on the originating chemical product for RCRA and internal cost tracking.']
  average_monthly_volume decimal(12,3) [note: 'Average volume of waste generated per month, expressed in unit_of_measure.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance status of the waste stream with applicable regulations.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the waste stream record was first created.']
  disposal_frequency varchar [note: 'Typical frequency at which the waste stream is disposed.']
  disposal_method varchar [note: 'Regulated method used to dispose of the waste stream.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the waste stream became effective for reporting and disposal planning.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the waste stream is no longer active (null if open‑ended).']
  epa_waste_code varchar [note: 'Four‑character EPA waste code (e.g., D001) that identifies the waste stream for regulatory reporting.']
  generation_rate decimal(12,3) [note: 'Typical amount of waste generated per time unit (see unit_of_measure).']
  hazardous_materials varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of hazardous constituents present in the waste stream.']
  last_disposal_date date [note: 'Date when the waste stream was most recently disposed of.']
  rcra_hazardous boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the waste stream is classified as hazardous under RCRA regulations.']
  regulatory_notification_date date [note: 'Date on which the required regulatory notification was submitted.']
  regulatory_notification_status varchar [note: 'Current status of required regulatory notifications for the waste stream.']
  storage_location varchar [note: 'Physical location or facility where the waste stream is stored before disposal.']
  storage_requirements varchar [note: 'Special storage conditions (e.g., temperature, containment) required for the waste stream.']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Unit for the generation_rate (e.g., kilograms, liters).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the waste stream record.']
  waste_category varchar [note: 'Classification of the waste stream by hazard type.']
  waste_stream_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or catalogue code for the waste stream.']
  waste_stream_description varchar [note: 'Detailed textual description of the waste stream, including physical and chemical characteristics.']
  waste_stream_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the waste stream.']
  waste_stream_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the waste stream record.']

  Note: 'Master record defining each recurring waste stream generated by Chemical Mfg production processes. Captures waste stream name, physical/chemical description, generating process unit, EPA waste codes, RCRA hazardous waste determination, typical generation rate, approved disposal methods, storage requirements, and regulatory notification status. Provides the classification foundation for all waste disposal records and annual waste reporting.'
}

Table ehs.ehs_regulatory_submission {
  ehs_regulatory_submission_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the regulatory submission record.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: Regulatory submissions (e.g., EPA, TSCA) require specifying the exact chemical product for compliance tracking.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Allocates regulatory filing fees to the cost center responsible for the submission, enabling expense tracking.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who prepared and submitted the filing.']
  facility_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the manufacturing or storage facility associated with the submission.']
  formula_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to formulation.formula. Business justification: REGULATORY FILING: TRI and other EPA submissions require the exact chemical product (formula) identifier for accurate reporting.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: Regulatory filings for new chemicals are tied to the originating R&D project for traceability.']
  related_submission_ehs_regulatory_submission_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of a prior submission that this record amends or supersedes.']
  acknowledgment_date date [note: 'Date the acknowledgment was received from the agency.']
  acknowledgment_received boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the agency has sent an acknowledgment of receipt.']
  agency_recipient varchar [note: 'Government or regulatory agency to which the submission is addressed.']
  annual_throughput_quantity decimal(15,2) [note: 'Total amount of the chemical processed or used during the reporting year.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free‑text field for any additional notes or remarks about the submission.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'True if the submission meets all applicable regulatory requirements for the reporting period.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the submission record was first created in the system.']
  document_reference varchar [note: 'Reference (e.g., file path or document ID) to supporting documentation attached to the submission.']
  is_confidential boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the submission contains confidential information requiring restricted handling.']
  max_on_site_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Maximum quantity of the chemical that could be present on site at any time.']
  permit_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the permit, registration, or license granted by the agency.']
  release_quantity_air decimal(15,2) [note: 'Quantity of the chemical released to ambient air.']
  release_quantity_land decimal(15,2) [note: 'Quantity of the chemical released to land (soil, surface).']
  release_quantity_offsite_transfer decimal(15,2) [note: 'Quantity transferred off‑site for disposal or treatment.']
  release_quantity_water decimal(15,2) [note: 'Quantity of the chemical released to water bodies.']
  reporting_period_end date [note: 'End date of the reporting period covered by the submission.']
  reporting_period_start date [note: 'Start date of the reporting period covered by the submission.']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year for which the TRI or other regulatory data is reported.']
  source_reduction_activity_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of activities undertaken to reduce chemical usage or releases.']
  submission_date date [note: 'Date the submission was formally made to the agency.']
  submission_number varchar [note: 'External reference number assigned to the submission by the organization.']
  submission_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the submission.']
  submission_type varchar [note: 'Category of the regulatory filing (e.g., TRI Form R, RMP, Title V permit renewal).']
  submission_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the submission record, incremented on each amendment.']
  submitted_by_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the employee who submitted the filing.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the submission record.']
  waste_management_hierarchy varchar [note: 'Preferred waste management method according to hierarchy (e.g., recycle, treatment).']

  Note: 'Record of formal regulatory submissions, TRI chemical inventory/release calculations, and supporting documentation for Chemical Mfg environmental and safety agency filings. Submission tracking: submission type (TRI Form R, RMP, Title V permit renewal, TSCA CDR, REACH registration, OSHA PSM audit response), submission date, reporting period, agency recipient, status, acknowledgment receipt, permit/registration number. TRI inventory and reporting: TRI-listed chemical (CAS number), facility, reporting year, maximum amount on-site, annual throughput quantity, release quantities by media (air, water, land, off-site transfer), waste management hierarchy data, source reduction activities, Form R submission linkage. Provides the compliance submission audit trail for SOX, ISO 14001/45001 management reviews, EPCRA Section 313 annual reporting, and all agency filing requirements.'
}

Table ehs.operating_permit {
  operating_permit_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for operating_permit']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Links permit fees to the cost center bearing the permit cost for accurate financial allocation.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.site. Business justification: Operating permits are issued to a specific site; association is required for renewal tracking and audit readiness.']
  air_emission_type varchar [note: 'Specific air pollutant or emission category regulated.']
  amendment_effective_date date [note: 'Effective date of the latest permit amendment.']
  amendment_expiration_date date [note: 'Expiration date of the latest permit amendment, if applicable.']
  compliance_report_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the required compliance report must be submitted.']
  compliance_report_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the compliance reporting requirement.']
  compliance_report_submitted_date date [note: 'Date the compliance report was actually submitted.']
  compliance_schedule varchar [note: 'Timeline of compliance milestones and reporting dates.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance standing of the facility under this permit.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the permit record was first created in the system.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date the permit becomes effective.']
  emission_limit_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the emission limit.']
  emission_limit_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Numeric limit on emissions defined by the permit.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date the permit expires.']
  facility_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the facility to which the permit applies.']
  hazardous_waste_type varchar [note: 'Classification of hazardous waste covered by the permit.']
  issuing_agency varchar [note: 'Regulatory authority that issued the permit.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent compliance inspection.']
  monitoring_requirements varchar [note: 'Specific monitoring activities required for compliance.']
  next_inspection_due date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next required inspection.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the permit.']
  operating_permit_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the permit.']
  permit_amendment_number varchar [note: 'Sequential number of the most recent amendment to the permit.']
  permit_conditions varchar [note: 'Key conditions and obligations imposed by the permit.']
  permit_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the electronic copy of the permit document.']
  permit_expiration_notice_sent boolean [note: 'Indicates whether an expiration notice has been sent to the permit holder.']
  permit_holder_address varchar [note: 'Mailing address of the permit holder.']
  permit_holder_contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for the permit holder\'s contact.']
  permit_holder_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Primary phone number for the permit holder\'s contact.']
  permit_holder_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the organization or entity holding the permit.']
  permit_number varchar [note: 'Official permit number assigned by the issuing agency.']
  permit_type varchar [note: 'Category of the permit indicating the regulated medium or activity.']
  renewal_deadline date [note: 'Deadline by which the permit must be renewed.']
  renewal_status varchar [note: 'Current renewal status of the permit.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating source system for the permit data (e.g., Intelex).']
  total_fines_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Cumulative monetary fines assessed for violations.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the permit record.']
  violation_count varchar [note: 'Number of recorded violations against the permit.']
  water_discharge_type varchar [note: 'Category of water discharge (e.g., effluent, stormwater) covered.']

  Note: 'Environmental and safety operating permit master record for Chemical Mfg facilities. Captures permit type (Title V air, NPDES wastewater, RCRA storage, state air permit, stormwater SWPPP), issuing agency, permit number, facility, effective date, expiration date, renewal status, key permit conditions, emission limits, monitoring requirements, and compliance schedule milestones. Serves as the SSOT for permit-driven compliance obligations across air, water, and waste programs.'
}

Table ehs.inspection_audit {
  inspection_audit_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for inspection_audit']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Charges audit costs to the responsible cost center for internal audit budgeting.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the employee or external auditor who performed the inspection.']
  functional_location_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the plant, site, or location where the inspection took place.']
  affected_area varchar [note: 'Physical area, process unit, or system within the facility impacted by the finding.']
  closure_status varchar [note: 'Overall status of the inspection\'s corrective action closure process.']
  corrective_actions_required varchar [note: 'Count of distinct corrective actions that must be implemented to close findings.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the inspection record was first entered into the system.']
  critical_findings varchar [note: 'Number of findings classified as critical severity, requiring immediate corrective action.']
  due_date date [note: 'Latest date by which all corrective actions for the inspection must be completed.']
  high_findings varchar [note: 'Number of findings classified as high severity.']
  inspection_number varchar [note: 'Business-assigned identifier for the inspection, often used in reports and regulatory filings.']
  inspection_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the inspection record.']
  inspection_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the inspection was actually performed.']
  inspection_type varchar [note: 'Category of the inspection, indicating the governing standard or agency (e.g., OSHA compliance audit, EPA facility inspection).']
  low_findings varchar [note: 'Number of findings classified as low severity.']
  medium_findings varchar [note: 'Number of findings classified as medium severity.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free‑text comments captured by the inspector, including observations not captured in structured fields.']
  regulatory_standard_referenced varchar [note: 'Specific regulatory clause, standard, or guideline cited for each finding (e.g., OSHA 1910.119, EPA 40 CFR Part 61).']
  scope_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the inspection scope, including processes, areas, and systems examined.']
  total_findings varchar [note: 'Total number of findings (citations, observations, non‑conformances) recorded during the inspection.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the inspection record.']

  Note: 'EHS inspection, audit, and findings record for internal safety audits, regulatory agency inspections, and third-party compliance assessments at Chemical Mfg facilities. Captures inspection type (OSHA compliance audit, EPA facility inspection, ISO 14001/45001 internal audit, Responsible Care verification), inspection date, inspector/auditor identity, scope, and individual findings (citations, observations, nonconformances, severity, regulatory standard referenced, affected area, required corrective action, due date, closure status). Supports ISO 14001 Clause 9.2 internal audit, OSHA PSM compliance audit requirements, and drives CAPA generation from findings.'
}

Table ehs.inspection_finding {
  inspection_finding_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the inspection finding record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the inspector or auditor who recorded the finding.']
  equipment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the equipment, asset, or system associated with the finding.']
  functional_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the physical location (plant, site, area) where the finding was observed.']
  org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the organizational department responsible for the area or equipment.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to supply.vendor. Business justification: Supplier audits generate findings; linking each finding to the vendor allows corrective‑action tracking and supplier performance metrics.']
  attachment_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether supporting documents or images are attached to the finding.']
  closure_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the finding was formally closed.']
  corrective_action_due_date date [note: 'Target date by which the corrective action must be completed.']
  corrective_action_required varchar [note: 'Specific corrective or preventive action that must be taken to address the finding.']
  corrective_action_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the corrective action associated with the finding.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the finding record was first created in the system.']
  finding_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable identifier assigned to the finding, often used in reports and corrective action tracking.']
  finding_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the finding (e.g., citation, observation, opportunity for improvement, non‑conformance).']
  impact_area varchar [note: 'Business area or function impacted by the finding.']
  inspection_finding_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative of the observation, condition, or non‑conformance.']
  inspection_finding_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the finding.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes entered by the inspector or follow‑up personnel.']
  observed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the finding was observed or recorded during the inspection.']
  priority varchar [note: 'Priority assigned to the finding for remediation planning.']
  regulatory_standard varchar [note: 'Regulatory or industry standard that the finding references.']
  risk_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Numeric risk score derived from severity, likelihood, and exposure factors.']
  root_cause varchar [note: 'Identified root cause(s) underlying the finding.']
  severity_level varchar [note: 'Severity rating assigned to the finding based on risk impact.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'System of record where the finding originated (e.g., Intelex, SAP, manual audit).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the finding record.']

  Note: 'Individual finding or observation recorded during an EHS inspection or audit at Chemical Mfg. Captures finding type (citation, observation, opportunity for improvement, nonconformance), regulatory standard referenced, severity level, affected area or equipment, finding description, required corrective action, due date, and closure status. Child record of ehs_inspection; drives CAPA generation and regulatory response tracking.'
}

Table ehs.management_of_change {
  management_of_change_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for management_of_change']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: MOC records often involve changes to a specific chemical product; linking enables traceability and compliance.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Tracks MOC implementation costs to the cost center responsible for the change.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee or contractor who submitted the MOC.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: MOC approvals often reference the R&D project they affect; linking supports change impact analysis.']
  affected_equipment_ids varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of equipment IDs that will be modified.']
  affected_pids varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of Piping & Instrumentation Diagram identifiers affected.']
  affected_processes varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of process identifiers impacted by the change.']
  approval_chain varchar [note: 'Ordered list of approver identifiers (e.g., employee IDs) for the MOC.']
  approval_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the MOC approval workflow.']
  change_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative describing the scope, rationale, and expected impact of the change.']
  change_title varchar [note: 'Brief title summarizing the proposed change.']
  change_type varchar [note: 'Category of the change indicating what is being modified.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Additional free‑form notes or comments related to the MOC.']
  compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the change complies with all applicable regulations.']
  cost_currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the cost estimate.']
  cost_estimate_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated monetary cost to implement the change.']
  document_reference_ids varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of document identifiers attached to the MOC (e.g., safety analysis reports).']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the change becomes operationally effective.']
  hazop_update_required boolean [note: 'Flag indicating if a HAZOP or PHA update is required due to the change.']
  implementation_end_date date [note: 'Planned or actual completion date of the change implementation.']
  implementation_start_date date [note: 'Planned start date for implementing the change.']
  implementation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the change implementation.']
  initiating_department varchar [note: 'Organizational department that originated the MOC request.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Overall lifecycle state of the MOC record.']
  moc_number varchar [note: 'Unique alphanumeric code assigned to the MOC request.']
  moc_submitted_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the MOC request was initially submitted.']
  pre_startup_safety_review_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the pre‑startup safety review for the change.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the MOC record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the MOC record.']
  regulatory_submission_date date [note: 'Date when the regulatory submission was made.']
  regulatory_submission_status varchar [note: 'Status of any required regulatory submission related to the change.']
  risk_category varchar [note: 'Qualitative risk classification derived from the risk score.']
  risk_score varchar [note: 'Numeric risk rating assigned to the change (e.g., 1‑5).']
  safety_review_completed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the required safety review has been completed.']
  technical_basis varchar [note: 'Technical justification for the change, such as engineering study or safety analysis.']

  Note: 'Process Safety Management (PSM) Management of Change (MOC) record for Chemical Mfg process modifications. Captures change description, change type (process chemistry, equipment, procedure, facility), initiating department, technical basis, safety review completion, HAZOP/PHA update requirement, pre-startup safety review (PSSR) status, affected P&IDs, approval chain, and implementation date. Required under OSHA PSM 29 CFR 1910.119(l) for all changes to covered processes.'
}

Table ehs.process_safety_info {
  process_safety_info_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the Process Safety Information record.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: PSI documents are product‑specific, linking ensures consistent safety data across processes.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: PSI documents are generated for new chemicals under a project; linking enables project‑level safety compliance.']
  autoignition_temp_c decimal(8,2) [note: 'Temperature at which the chemical will spontaneously ignite without an external flame.']
  boiling_point_c decimal(8,2) [note: 'Boiling point temperature in degrees Celsius.']
  compatible_materials varchar [note: 'Materials that are safe to store or transport the chemical with.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the PSI record was initially created.']
  density_kg_per_m3 decimal(10,3) [note: 'Mass per unit volume of the chemical at standard temperature and pressure.']
  document_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier for the linked safety data sheet or regulatory document.']
  emergency_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the person to contact in case of an incident involving the chemical.']
  emergency_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number for the emergency contact.']
  emergency_procedure varchar [note: 'Brief description of the emergency response steps for this chemical.']
  environmental_hazards varchar [note: 'Key environmental risk categories for the chemical.']
  flash_point_c decimal(8,2) [note: 'Lowest temperature at which the chemical can form an ignitable mixture in air.']
  hazard_classification varchar [note: 'Primary GHS hazard class for the chemical.']
  health_hazards varchar [note: 'Primary health hazard categories associated with the chemical.']
  incompatible_materials varchar [note: 'Materials that must not contact the chemical due to reactive hazards.']
  inventory_uom varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the maximum inventory amount.']
  iupac_name varchar [note: 'Systematic International Union of Pure and Applied Chemistry name for the chemical.']
  last_review_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the PSI record was last reviewed for accuracy.']
  max_inventory_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum quantity of the chemical intended to be stored on site.']
  melting_point_c decimal(8,2) [note: 'Melting point temperature in degrees Celsius.']
  molecular_weight decimal(12,4) [note: 'Molecular weight of the chemical in grams per mole.']
  next_review_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Planned date and time for the next periodic review.']
  odor_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the chemical\'s odor.']
  ph decimal(4,2) [note: 'Acidity/alkalinity of the chemical in aqueous solution.']
  process_safety_info_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the PSI record.']
  psm_covered boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the chemical is covered under OSHA Process Safety Management.']
  reactivity_hazards varchar [note: 'Reactivity hazard classifications indicating dangerous reactions.']
  regulatory_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance status with applicable regulations (OSHA, EPA, REACH, etc.).']
  rmp_covered boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the chemical is covered under EPA Risk Management Plan requirements.']
  safety_data_sheet_url varchar [note: 'Web address where the current SDS for the chemical is stored.']
  solubility_water varchar [note: 'Qualitative description of solubility in water (e.g., miscible, limited, insoluble).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating operational system (e.g., SAP PM, Intelex EHS).']
  storage_pressure_bar decimal(8,2) [note: 'Pressure range recommended for safe storage.']
  storage_temperature_c decimal(8,2) [note: 'Temperature range recommended for safe storage.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the PSI record.']
  vapor_pressure_kpa decimal(10,3) [note: 'Equilibrium vapor pressure of the chemical at 20 °C expressed in kilopascals.']

  Note: 'Process Safety Information (PSI) master record for highly hazardous chemicals and covered processes at Chemical Mfg facilities under OSHA PSM. Captures chemical identity (CAS number), maximum intended inventory, physical/chemical properties, reactivity hazards, corrosivity data, thermal stability data, P&ID reference, equipment design specifications, and safe operating limits. Required documentation under OSHA 29 CFR 1910.119(d) and EPA RMP 40 CFR Part 68.'
}

Table ehs.safety_data_sheet {
  safety_data_sheet_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for safety_data_sheet']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: EHS SDS records must reference the master chemical product for unified hazard communication.']
  process_safety_info_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ehs.process_safety_info. Business justification: Safety Data Sheet records describe the same chemical identified in Process Safety Info. Linking SDS to PSI via process_safety_info_id removes duplicate chemical identifiers.']
  accidental_release_measures varchar [note: 'Steps to contain and clean up accidental releases.']
  author varchar [note: 'Name of the person or team that authored the SDS.']
  boiling_point_c decimal(10,2) [note: 'Boiling point of the substance in degrees Celsius.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification indicating the sensitivity of the SDS record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the SDS record was first created in the system.']
  density_kg_per_m3 decimal(12,3) [note: 'Mass per unit volume at 20 °C.']
  document_url varchar [note: 'Permanent link to the electronic SDS document.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the SDS version became effective.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date after which the SDS is no longer valid (if applicable).']
  exposure_controls varchar [note: 'Engineering controls and personal protective equipment (PPE) requirements.']
  firefighting_measures varchar [note: 'Procedures and extinguishing media for fire involving the substance.']
  first_aid_measures varchar [note: 'Recommended first‑aid actions in case of exposure.']
  flash_point_c decimal(10,2) [note: 'Temperature at which the substance can form an ignitable mixture with air.']
  ghs_classification varchar [note: 'GHS hazard classification string summarizing hazard classes and categories.']
  handling_and_storage varchar [note: 'Guidelines for safe handling, storage conditions, and segregation.']
  hazard_class varchar [note: 'Primary GHS hazard class (e.g., Flammable, Toxic).']
  language varchar [note: 'ISO language code of the SDS document.']
  melting_point_c decimal(10,2) [note: 'Melting point of the substance in degrees Celsius.']
  personal_protective_equipment varchar [note: 'Specific PPE recommended for handling the substance.']
  ph decimal(5,2) [note: 'Acidity/alkalinity of the substance in aqueous solution.']
  physical_chemical_properties varchar [note: 'Free‑form description of key physical and chemical characteristics.']
  pictograms varchar [note: 'List of GHS pictogram codes applicable to the substance.']
  precautionary_statements varchar [note: 'Standard GHS precautionary statements for handling the substance.']
  reach_registration_number varchar [note: 'ECHA registration identifier for the substance.']
  regulatory_information varchar [note: 'Key regulatory status notes (e.g., REACH, TSCA, OSHA).']
  revision_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent revision to the SDS content.']
  sds_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the SDS record.']
  sds_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the SDS document, e.g., \'1.0\', \'2.1\'.']
  signal_word varchar [note: 'GHS signal word indicating severity of hazards.']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that supplied the SDS data.']
  toxicological_information varchar [note: 'Summary of acute, chronic, and specific toxicity data.']
  tsca_sara_313_status varchar [note: 'U.S. TSCA SARA 313 reporting requirement status.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the SDS record.']
  vapor_pressure_kpa decimal(10,2) [note: 'Equilibrium vapor pressure at 20 °C expressed in kilopascals.']

  Note: 'Safety Data Sheet (SDS/MSDS) master record for all chemical substances handled, produced, or distributed by Chemical Mfg. Captures SDS version, GHS classification (hazard class, category, signal word, pictograms), CAS number, chemical composition, first-aid measures, firefighting measures, exposure controls, PPE requirements, physical/chemical properties, stability/reactivity data, toxicological information, and regulatory status (REACH, TSCA, SARA 313). Integrates with product and raw material domains via CAS number.'
}

Table ehs.training_record {
  training_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for training_record']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Assigns training expenses to the cost center sponsoring the training, supporting cost allocation.']
  primary_training_employee_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the employee who received the training.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: Training records must be linked to the R&D project to ensure personnel are qualified for specific processes.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the plant or facility associated with the training.']
  vendor_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the third‑party contractor who received the training.']
  actual_end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Actual end date and time when the training concluded.']
  actual_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Actual start date and time when the training began.']
  assessment_passed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the participant passed the post‑training assessment.']
  assessment_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Score achieved on the post‑training assessment (0‑100).']
  attendance_count varchar [note: 'Number of participants who attended the training session.']
  certification_expiry_date date [note: 'Date when the training‑related certification expires and retraining is required.']
  certification_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the issued certificate, if applicable.']
  completion_date date [note: 'Date on which the participant successfully completed the training.']
  compliance_requirement varchar [note: 'Regulatory or internal compliance program that mandates the training.']
  cost_amount decimal(12,2) [note: 'Monetary cost incurred for delivering the training.']
  created_by_user varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the training record.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 code of the currency used for the training cost.']
  delivery_method varchar [note: 'How the training was delivered to the participant.']
  document_reference varchar [note: 'Link or identifier to the training syllabus, agenda, or certificate document.']
  duration_hours decimal(6,2) [note: 'Total number of hours (including breaks) the training lasted.']
  is_external_contractor boolean [note: 'True if the participant is a third‑party contractor rather than a direct employee.']
  is_mandatory boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the training is required by law or company policy.']
  max_participants varchar [note: 'Maximum number of participants allowed for the session.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the training session.']
  record_created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the training record was first entered into the system.']
  record_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the training record.']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Specific regulation, standard, or clause that the training satisfies.']
  retraining_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the participant must complete refresher training.']
  scheduled_end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Planned end date and time for the training session.']
  scheduled_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Planned start date and time for the training session.']
  trainer_name varchar [note: 'Name of the individual or organization delivering the training.']
  training_category varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the training content.']
  training_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the training content and objectives.']
  training_location varchar [note: 'Physical or virtual location where the training was delivered.']
  training_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier or code assigned to the training event.']
  training_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the training record.']
  training_title varchar [note: 'Descriptive title of the training program.']
  training_type varchar [note: 'Category of training required by regulatory or internal safety programs.']
  updated_by_user varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last updated the training record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the training record for audit and change tracking.']

  Note: 'EHS training, competence, and contractor safety qualification record for Chemical Mfg employees and third-party contractors. Employee training: trainee identity, training program, training type (HAZWOPER, PSM operator training, GHS/HazCom, emergency response, confined space, LOTO), delivery method, completion date, assessment score, certification expiry, retraining due date. Contractor safety: contractor company, contract scope, safety prequalification status, OSHA 300 log review, EMR (Experience Modification Rate), site-specific orientation completion, safety performance metrics (recordable rate, near-miss frequency), active violations, re-qualification due date. Supports OSHA training compliance, PSM contractor safety program (29 CFR 1910.119(h)), ISO 45001 competence management (Clause 7.2), and Responsible Care contractor management.'
}

Table ehs.emergency_response_plan {
  emergency_response_plan_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for the emergency response plan record.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: ERPs are drafted for specific chemicals; linking supports drill planning and regulatory compliance.']
  coordinator_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Emergency response plans assign a coordinator (employee); a proper FK replaces the name field for compliance reporting.']
  location_id varchar [note: 'Geographic location identifier (e.g., site, campus) for the plan.']
  operating_permit_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ehs.operating_permit. Business justification: Emergency response plans are tied to the operating permit that authorizes the facility\'s emissions. Adding operating_permit_id to emergency_response_plan links the plan to its governing permit.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: Project‑specific emergency response plans are required for pilot plant operations and regulatory reviews.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.site. Business justification: Emergency response plans are site‑specific; linking supports drill scheduling, compliance checks, and incident coordination.']
  community_notification_thresholds varchar [note: 'Quantitative or situational thresholds that trigger external community alerts.']
  covered_hazards varchar [note: 'Narrative list of specific chemicals, processes, or scenarios addressed by the plan.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the plan record was first created in the system.']
  drill_completion_status varchar [note: 'Result of the most recent drill.']
  drill_observations varchar [note: 'Narrative observations, performance notes, and corrective actions identified during the drill.']
  drill_schedule varchar [note: 'Planned frequency and timing of emergency response drills (e.g., quarterly, annual).']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the plan becomes effective and binding.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the plan expires or is superseded; null for open‑ended plans.']
  emergency_coordinator_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for the emergency coordinator.']
  emergency_coordinator_phone varchar [note: 'Primary telephone number for the emergency coordinator.']
  evacuation_routes_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of evacuation routes and assembly points.']
  facility_code varchar [note: 'Identifier of the facility or plant to which the plan applies.']
  last_drill_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent emergency response drill.']
  last_review_date date [note: 'Date when the plan was last formally reviewed and approved.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current state of the plan in its lifecycle.']
  plan_category varchar [note: 'Broad hazard category covered (e.g., chemical release, fire, explosion, natural disaster, environmental emergency).']
  plan_document_url varchar [note: 'Link to the stored electronic copy of the full emergency response plan.']
  plan_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the emergency response plan.']
  plan_type varchar [note: 'Regulatory classification of the plan as required by OSHA, EPA, or EPCRA.']
  plan_version varchar [note: 'Version label or number for the plan (e.g., v1.2, 2023‑Q2).']
  regulatory_submission_date date [note: 'Date the plan was submitted to the applicable regulatory agency.']
  regulatory_submission_status varchar [note: 'Current status of required regulatory filings for the plan.']
  shelter_in_place_procedures varchar [note: 'Procedures to be followed when shelter‑in‑place is required.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the plan record.']

  Note: 'Emergency response plan master record for Chemical Mfg facilities covering chemical release, fire, explosion, natural disaster, and environmental emergency scenarios. Captures plan type (OSHA EAP, EPA RMP Emergency Response Program, SPCC Plan, EPCRA LEPC notification), covered hazards, emergency coordinator contacts, evacuation routes, shelter-in-place procedures, community notification thresholds, drill schedule and completion history, performance observations from exercises, last review date, and regulatory submission status. Required under OSHA 29 CFR 1910.38, EPA RMP 40 CFR Part 68, and EPCRA Section 304. Now includes drill/exercise tracking previously in emergency_drill.'
}

Table ehs.environmental_monitoring {
  environmental_monitoring_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for each environmental monitoring record.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: Monitoring results are tied to the chemical product to assess environmental impact and permit limits.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Tracks monitoring program costs against the cost center funding the activity.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the analyst who reviewed or approved the analytical result.']
  functional_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the plant, facility, or monitoring site where the sample originated.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: Monitoring data (e.g., sample results) are collected for specific R&D projects to validate process performance.']
  sample_id varchar [note: 'Unique alphanumeric code assigned to the environmental sample.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to customer.site. Business justification: Sampling locations are tied to a site; linking enables site‑level trend analysis and regulatory limit tracking.']
  work_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to production.work_center. Business justification: Environmental samples are collected at work‑center locations; linking to work_center ties data to the production unit responsible.']
  chain_of_custody_number varchar [note: 'Number tracking the custody and handling of the sample from collection to analysis.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free‑text field for additional observations or notes about the sample or result.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the monitoring record was first entered into the system.']
  detection_limit decimal(12,4) [note: 'Lowest concentration that the analytical method can reliably detect.']
  environmental_monitoring_status varchar [note: 'Current processing status of the monitoring record.']
  event_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the environmental sample was collected or the measurement was taken.']
  exceedance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the result exceeds the regulatory limit (true) or not (false).']
  lab_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier of the laboratory that performed the analysis.']
  media_type varchar [note: 'Physical medium being monitored (e.g., air, water, soil).']
  parameter varchar [note: 'Chemical or physical parameter measured (e.g., pH, VOC, lead).']
  quality_flag varchar [note: 'Quality status of the analytical result after laboratory review.']
  regulatory_limit decimal(12,4) [note: 'Maximum allowable concentration set by regulatory agencies for the parameter.']
  regulatory_reporting_requirement varchar [note: 'Regulatory program or standard to which this monitoring record contributes.']
  result_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Analytical result of the parameter measurement expressed in the specified unit.']
  sample_method varchar [note: 'Technique used to collect the sample (e.g., grab, composite, automated).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Originating system that supplied the monitoring data (e.g., Intelex, LIMS).']
  unit_of_measure varchar [note: 'Units associated with the result value (e.g., mg/L, µg/m³, ppm).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent modification to the monitoring record.']

  Note: 'Ambient and effluent environmental monitoring record for Chemical Mfg facilities covering air quality, wastewater effluent, groundwater, and stormwater monitoring programs. Captures monitoring location, media type (air, water, soil, groundwater), parameter measured, analytical result, units, detection limit, regulatory limit, exceedance flag, sampling date, laboratory reference, and chain-of-custody number. Feeds NPDES discharge monitoring reports (DMR), Title V deviation reports, and ISO 14001 environmental performance evaluation.'
}

Table ehs.tri_inventory {
  tri_inventory_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the TRI inventory record.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: TRI inventory submissions aggregate data per chemical product; linking ensures accurate reporting of on‑site amounts.']
  form_r_submission_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the EPA Form R submission linked to this record.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: TRI inventory reporting distinguishes quantities by project to allocate emissions and waste to development activities.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Unique identifier of the facility in the enterprise system.']
  annual_throughput_quantity decimal(15,3) [note: 'Total amount of the chemical processed or used during the reporting year, in pounds.']
  annual_throughput_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the annual throughput.']
  chemical_state varchar [note: 'Physical state of the chemical at standard conditions.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification level for the record.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first created in the system.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'Source system where the data originated.']
  emission_factor decimal(10,5) [note: 'Factor used to calculate estimated emissions; unitless.']
  facility_name varchar [note: 'Name of the reporting facility.']
  form_r_submission_date date [note: 'Date the Form R was submitted to EPA.']
  hazard_classification varchar [note: 'Hazard classification(s) for the chemical per GHS.']
  last_review_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the last regulatory review of the record.']
  max_on_site_amount decimal(15,3) [note: 'Maximum amount of the chemical present on site during the reporting year, in pounds.']
  max_on_site_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the maximum on-site amount.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-text notes related to the TRI inventory entry.']
  ppe_required boolean [note: 'Indicates if personal protective equipment is required when handling the chemical.']
  record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the TRI inventory record.']
  release_air_quantity decimal(15,3) [note: 'Quantity of chemical released to air, in pounds.']
  release_land_quantity decimal(15,3) [note: 'Quantity of chemical released to land, in pounds.']
  release_offsite_transfer_quantity decimal(15,3) [note: 'Quantity of chemical transferred off-site for treatment or disposal, in pounds.']
  release_water_quantity decimal(15,3) [note: 'Quantity of chemical released to water, in pounds.']
  reporting_threshold_exceeded boolean [note: 'Flag indicating whether the chemical exceeds the EPCRA reporting threshold.']
  reporting_year varchar [note: 'Calendar year for which the TRI data is reported.']
  source_reduction_activities varchar [note: 'Narrative description of source reduction activities performed for the chemical.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  waste_management_hierarchy varchar [note: 'Highest level of waste management hierarchy applied to the chemical.']

  Note: 'Toxics Release Inventory (TRI) chemical inventory and release calculation record for Chemical Mfg annual EPA Form R reporting. Captures TRI-listed chemical (CAS number), facility, reporting year, maximum amount on-site, annual throughput quantity, release quantities by media (air, water, land, off-site transfer), waste management hierarchy data, source reduction activities, and Form R submission linkage. Required annually under EPCRA Section 313 for facilities meeting reporting thresholds.'
}

Table ehs.management_objective {
  management_objective_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for management_objective']
  achievement_status varchar [note: 'Current status of progress against the target.']
  additional_control_recommendation varchar [note: 'Suggested further controls to reduce residual risk.']
  affected_activity varchar [note: 'Work activity or process that the hazard could impact.']
  aspect_activity varchar [note: 'Business activity or process linked to the environmental aspect (e.g., batch mixing, waste handling).']
  aspect_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the identified environmental aspect.']
  attached_document_count varchar [note: 'Number of supporting documents linked to the objective record.']
  baseline_value decimal(12,2) [note: 'Current value of the metric at the start of the improvement cycle.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the objective record was first created in the system.']
  effective_end_date date [note: 'Date when the objective expires or is superseded; null for open‑ended objectives.']
  effective_start_date date [note: 'Date when the objective becomes effective for compliance and performance tracking.']
  environmental_impact varchar [note: 'Potential impact on environment resulting from the aspect (e.g., emissions, water use).']
  existing_control varchar [note: 'Current control measures in place to mitigate the environmental aspect.']
  hazard_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the occupational health and safety hazard.']
  hazard_type varchar [note: 'Category of the hazard (chemical, physical, etc.).']
  inherent_risk_rating varchar [note: 'Risk rating before any controls are applied.']
  last_review_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent management review of the objective.']
  legal_requirement varchar [note: 'Regulatory or statutory requirement linked to the aspect (e.g., EPA, REACH).']
  management_objective_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the objective record.']
  measurement_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the metric is measured and reported.']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the metric (e.g., kg CO₂e, incidents per 200 000 hrs).']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations related to the objective.']
  objective_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or code used to reference the objective in EHS systems and reports.']
  objective_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the integrated ISO management objective.']
  objective_title varchar [note: 'Human‑readable title describing the objective or planning record.']
