  objective_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the objective: environmental aspect, occupational health & safety hazard, or integrated ISO objective.']
  progress_milestone varchar [note: 'Key milestone or checkpoint toward the objective.']
  residual_risk_rating varchar [note: 'Risk rating after existing controls are considered.']
  residual_significance varchar [note: 'Significance rating after accounting for existing controls.']
  responsible_function varchar [note: 'Organizational function or department accountable for achieving the objective.']
  risk_review_date date [note: 'Planned date for reviewing the hazard risk and controls.']
  significance_criteria varchar [note: 'Criteria used to evaluate the significance of the environmental aspect (e.g., legal thresholds, stakeholder concern).']
  significance_rating varchar [note: 'Resulting significance rating after applying the criteria.']
  target_metric varchar [note: 'Measurable metric for the objective (e.g., CO₂ emissions, lost‑time injury rate).']
  target_value decimal(12,2) [note: 'Desired future value for the metric as defined in the objective.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the objective record.']

  Note: 'Integrated ISO management system planning record for Chemical Mfg facilities consolidating three core planning elements: (1) Environmental aspects/impacts register (ISO 14001 Clause 6.1.2) — activity, aspect description, environmental impact, significance determination criteria, significance rating, applicable legal requirements, existing controls, residual significance; (2) OHS hazard identification and risk assessment (ISO 45001 Clause 6.1.2) — hazard description, hazard type (chemical, physical, biological, ergonomic, psychosocial), affected work activity, inherent/residual risk ratings, existing controls, additional control recommendations, review dates; (3) Management objectives and targets (ISO 14001/45001 Clause 6.2) — measurable targets, baseline/target values, measurement frequency, responsible function, progress milestones, achievement status. Supports integrated EHS management system planning, continual improvement, legal compliance evaluation, and management review inputs.'
}

Table ehs.environmental_aspect {
  environmental_aspect_id varchar [pk, note: 'System‑generated unique identifier for each environmental aspect record.']
  management_objective_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ehs.management_objective. Business justification: Environmental aspects are managed through ISO objectives. Adding management_objective_id to environmental_aspect connects each aspect to its governing objective.']
  aspect_category varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the aspect (air, water, soil, waste, energy, or other).']
  aspect_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier or code used to reference the aspect in reports and systems.']
  aspect_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the environmental aspect (e.g., VOC emissions from reactor venting).']
  aspect_subcategory varchar [note: 'More detailed classification within the main category (e.g., VOC, NOx for air).']
  control_measures varchar [note: 'Controls currently in place to mitigate the aspect (e.g., scrubbers, waste treatment).']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the aspect record was first created.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date when the aspect record became active in the register.']
  environmental_aspect_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the activity or process that generates the environmental aspect.']
  environmental_aspect_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the aspect record.']
  environmental_impact varchar [note: 'Description of the potential environmental impact associated with the aspect (e.g., air quality degradation, water contamination).']
  last_assessed_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the aspect was last evaluated for significance.']
  legal_requirement varchar [note: 'Applicable legal or regulatory requirement linked to the aspect (e.g., EPA emission limit, REACH registration).']
  measurement_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the aspect\'s quantitative value.']
  monitoring_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the aspect is monitored or measured.']
  residual_significance varchar [note: 'Significance rating after accounting for existing controls.']
  retirement_date date [note: 'Date when the aspect was retired or removed from active monitoring (if applicable).']
  significance_criteria varchar [note: 'Criteria used to evaluate the significance of the aspect (e.g., regulatory thresholds, stakeholder concerns).']
  significance_rating varchar [note: 'Resulting significance rating after applying the criteria (high, medium, low).']
  source_system varchar [note: 'Source system where the aspect record originated (e.g., Intelex EHS Management).']
  threshold_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Regulatory or internal threshold value for the aspect (e.g., 50 ppm).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the aspect record.']

  Note: 'Environmental aspect and impact register for Chemical Mfg operations under ISO 14001. Captures activity or process generating the aspect, aspect description (e.g., VOC emissions from reactor venting, wastewater discharge from CIP operations), associated environmental impact, significance determination criteria, significance rating, applicable legal requirements, existing controls, and residual significance. Core to ISO 14001 Clause 6.1.2 environmental aspects and impacts evaluation.'
}

Table ehs.ohs_risk_assessment {
  ohs_risk_assessment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the OHS risk assessment record.']
  functional_location_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the plant or site where the activity occurs.']
  org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the organizational department responsible for the activity.']
  primary_ohs_employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the employee who performed the assessment.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.project. Business justification: OHS risk assessments are performed per R&D project to evaluate worker safety and meet regulatory requirements.']
  work_activity_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific work activity or task being assessed.']
  approval_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the assessment was formally approved.']
  assessment_date date [note: 'Date the risk assessment was performed.']
  assessment_method varchar [note: 'Method used to perform the risk assessment.']
  assessment_number varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the risk assessment, often used in reports and regulatory filings.']
  assessment_status varchar [note: 'Lifecycle status of the assessment record.']
  attachment_count varchar [note: 'Number of supporting documents or files attached to the assessment.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance determination for the assessed hazard.']
  control_recommendation_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the recommended control actions.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the record was first created in the system.']
  existing_controls varchar [note: 'Textual description of engineering, administrative, or PPE controls currently in place.']
  hazard_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the hazard, including chemical name, physical condition, or ergonomic factor.']
  hazard_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the primary hazard addressed by the assessment.']
  inherent_likelihood varchar [note: 'Likelihood rating (1‑5) before controls are applied.']
  inherent_risk_score varchar [note: 'Calculated inherent risk score (likelihood × severity).']
  inherent_severity varchar [note: 'Severity rating (1‑5) before controls are applied.']
  mitigation_due_date date [note: 'Target date by which recommended controls should be implemented.']
  mitigation_effectiveness varchar [note: 'Assessment of how well the implemented controls have reduced risk.']
  mitigation_status varchar [note: 'Current progress status of the mitigation plan.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information or observations.']
  ohs_risk_assessment_description varchar [note: 'Detailed narrative of the assessment scope, objectives, and context.']
  ppe_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether PPE is required for the assessed activity.']
  recommended_controls varchar [note: 'Suggested additional or enhanced controls to further reduce risk.']
  record_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the record for audit‑trail purposes.']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific regulation, standard, or clause (e.g., ISO 45001 Clause 6.1.2).']
  residual_likelihood varchar [note: 'Likelihood rating (1‑5) after existing controls are considered.']
  residual_risk_score varchar [note: 'Calculated residual risk score (likelihood × severity).']
  residual_severity varchar [note: 'Severity rating (1‑5) after existing controls are considered.']
  review_date date [note: 'Date the assessment was last reviewed or re‑validated.']
  revision_number varchar [note: 'Sequential revision identifier for changes to the assessment.']
  risk_rating varchar [note: 'Overall risk classification derived from the residual risk score.']
  title varchar [note: 'Short, human‑readable title describing the assessment focus.']
  training_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether specific safety training is required for the activity.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the record.']

  Note: 'Occupational Health and Safety (OHS) risk assessment record for Chemical Mfg work activities and tasks. Captures hazard description, hazard type (chemical, physical, biological, ergonomic, psychosocial), affected work activity, inherent risk rating (likelihood × severity), existing controls, residual risk rating, additional control recommendations, and review date. Supports ISO 45001 Clause 6.1.2 hazard identification and risk assessment and OSHA PSM process hazard analysis for non-PSM covered tasks.'
}

Table ehs.spill_release_event {
  spill_release_event_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the spill or accidental release event record.']
  chemical_product_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to product.chemical_product. Business justification: Spill reports must be linked to the chemical product for emergency response, EPA reporting, and liability tracking.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Allocates spill response and cleanup costs to the responsible cost center for financial impact analysis.']
  emergency_response_plan_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to ehs.emergency_response_plan. Business justification: Spill and release events are handled according to a facility\'s emergency response plan. Adding emergency_response_plan_id to spill_release_event creates the needed link.']
  functional_location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the specific site location (e.g., area, zone, or coordinate) within the facility.']
  logistics_shipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to logistics.shipment. Business justification: Spill Incident Reporting mandates linking a spill event to the shipment that caused it for EPA reporting and corrective action.']
  site_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the plant or facility where the spill occurred.']
  agencies_notified varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of regulatory agencies that were notified about the spill.']
  cleanup_completed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether remediation and cleanup activities have been completed.']
  cleanup_completion_date date [note: 'Date when the spill cleanup was officially closed.']
  comments varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional notes or observations about the spill.']
  containment_effectiveness varchar [note: 'Effectiveness of containment measures at the time of release.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the spill event record was first created in the system.']
  detection_method varchar [note: 'Method or sensor that first detected the release.']
  emergency_response_actions varchar [note: 'Summary of immediate actions taken to mitigate the spill.']
  event_number varchar [note: 'Business-assigned identifier or ticket number for the spill event, used for tracking and external reporting.']
  federal_report_number varchar [note: 'Report identifier assigned by the federal agency.']
  incident_report_number varchar [note: 'External report identifier assigned by regulatory agencies or internal tracking.']
  is_reportable_to_iso boolean [note: 'True if the incident must be reported under ISO 14001/45001 audit requirements.']
  is_reportable_to_osha boolean [note: 'True if the spill triggers OSHA recordable incident reporting.']
  is_reported_to_federal boolean [note: 'True if the spill was reported to a federal agency (e.g., EPA).']
  is_reported_to_state boolean [note: 'True if the spill was reported to the relevant state environmental agency.']
  iso_report_number varchar [note: 'Identifier for the ISO compliance report.']
  osha_report_number varchar [note: 'Identifier for the OSHA incident report.']
  quantity_released decimal(18,3) [note: 'Measured amount of chemical released.']
  quantity_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for the released quantity.']
  regulatory_reportable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the spill meets regulatory reporting thresholds.']
  release_cause varchar [note: 'Root cause category for the accidental release.']
  release_media varchar [note: 'Medium(s) into which the chemical was released.']
  release_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the chemical release actually occurred.']
  reportable_under_cercla boolean [note: 'True if the release is reportable under the Comprehensive Environmental Response, Compensation, and Liability Act.']
  reportable_under_epcra boolean [note: 'True if the release triggers reporting under EPCRA Section 304.']
  spill_release_event_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the spill event record.']
  state_spill_report_number varchar [note: 'Report identifier assigned by the state agency.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the spill event record.']
  weather_conditions varchar [note: 'Brief description of weather at the time of release (e.g., wind speed, precipitation).']

  Note: 'Chemical spill and accidental release event record for Chemical Mfg facilities. Captures release date/time, chemical identity (CAS number), quantity released, release media (air, soil, water, drain), release cause, containment effectiveness, emergency response actions taken, regulatory reportability determination (CERCLA RQ, EPCRA 304, state spill reporting), agency notification records, and cleanup completion status. Distinct from planned emission events; captures unplanned/accidental releases requiring immediate response.'
}

Table ehs.contractor_safety_record {
  contractor_safety_record_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique surrogate key for the contractor safety record.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Charges contractor safety audit costs to the cost center overseeing the contractor.']
  active_violations_count varchar [note: 'Count of currently open safety violations for the contractor.']
  active_violations_details varchar [note: 'Brief description of each active safety violation.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall compliance status of the contractor with EHS regulations.']
  contractor_address varchar [note: 'Street address of the contractor\'s primary office.']
  contractor_city varchar [note: 'City component of the contractor\'s address.']
  contractor_code varchar [note: 'Internal or external code used to identify the contractor.']
  contractor_country varchar [note: 'ISO 3166‑1 alpha‑3 country code of the contractor\'s primary location.']
  contractor_name varchar [note: 'Legal name of the contractor organization.']
  contractor_parent_company varchar [note: 'Name of the parent company if the contractor is a subsidiary.']
  contractor_state varchar [note: 'State or province component of the contractor\'s address.']
  contractor_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the contractor based on the nature of services provided.']
  contractor_zip varchar [note: 'Postal/ZIP code of the contractor\'s address.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the contractor safety record was first created.']
  emr_effective_date date [note: 'Date the EMR value became effective for the contractor.']
  experience_modification_rate decimal(5,2) [note: 'Insurance-based metric reflecting the contractor\'s safety performance.']
  insurance_certificate_number varchar [note: 'Number of the contractor\'s liability insurance certificate.']
  insurance_expiration_date date [note: 'Expiration date of the liability insurance certificate.']
  last_safety_audit_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent safety audit performed on the contractor.']
  last_safety_audit_score decimal(4,2) [note: 'Score (0‑100) assigned in the most recent safety audit.']
  near_miss_frequency decimal(6,3) [note: 'Frequency of near‑miss events per 1,000 work hours.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes or comments about the contractor\'s safety record.']
  orientation_completion_date date [note: 'Date the site-specific safety orientation was completed.']
  osha_300_log_review_status varchar [note: 'Status of the review of the contractor\'s OSHA 300 Log.']
  prequalification_expiration_date date [note: 'Date the prequalification status expires and must be renewed.']
  prequalification_review_date date [note: 'Date the safety prequalification was reviewed.']
  primary_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary safety contact.']
  primary_contact_name varchar [note: 'Full name of the primary safety contact for the contractor.']
  primary_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the primary safety contact.']
  primary_contact_role varchar [note: 'Job role of the primary safety contact within the contractor organization.']
  record_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the contractor safety record.']
  recordable_incident_rate decimal(6,3) [note: 'Number of recordable incidents per 200,000 work hours for the contractor.']
  regulatory_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific regulation(s) governing the contractor\'s safety requirements (e.g., OSHA, EPA).']
  requalification_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the contractor must be re‑qualified for safety compliance.']
  safety_audit_status varchar [note: 'Overall result of the latest safety audit.']
  safety_prequalification_status varchar [note: 'Result of the contractor\'s safety prequalification assessment.']
  site_specific_orientation_completed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the contractor has completed site-specific safety orientation.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the record.']
  workers_comp_cert_expiration date [note: 'Expiration date of the workers\' compensation certificate.']
  workers_compensation_certificate_number varchar [note: 'Number of the contractor\'s workers\' compensation insurance certificate.']

  Note: 'Contractor safety qualification and performance record for third-party contractors working at Chemical Mfg facilities. Captures contractor company, contract scope, safety prequalification status, OSHA 300 log review, EMR (Experience Modification Rate), site-specific safety orientation completion, safety performance metrics (recordable rate, near-miss frequency), active violations, and re-qualification due date. Supports OSHA PSM contractor safety program requirements under 29 CFR 1910.119(h) and Responsible Care contractor management.'
}

Table ehs.sampling_point {
  sampling_point_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for sampling_point']
  parent_sampling_point_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on sampling_point (parent_sampling_point_id)']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the physical address of the sampling point.']
  city varchar [note: 'City where the sampling point is located.']
  code varchar [note: 'Business‑assigned alphanumeric code uniquely identifying the sampling point.']
  contact_email varchar [note: 'Primary email address for the point of contact responsible for the sampling point.']
  contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number for the point of contact responsible for the sampling point.']
  country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO country code of the sampling point location.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the sampling point record was first created.']
  description varchar [note: 'Free‑form description providing context or notes about the sampling point.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date when the sampling point became operational.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date when the sampling point is scheduled to be retired or decommissioned (nullable).']
  elevation_m decimal(10,2) [note: 'Elevation of the sampling point above sea level, expressed in meters.']
  hazard_class varchar [note: 'Primary hazard classification associated with the sampling point.']
  is_hazardous boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the sampling point is located in a hazardous area.']
  last_sampling_date date [note: 'Date when the most recent sample was collected at this point.']
  latitude double [note: 'Geographic latitude of the sampling point in decimal degrees.']
  longitude double [note: 'Geographic longitude of the sampling point in decimal degrees.']
  media_type varchar [note: 'Physical medium being sampled (e.g., air, water).']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the sampling location.']
  next_sampling_due date [note: 'Planned date for the next scheduled sample collection.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information or remarks.']
  owner_department varchar [note: 'Organizational department responsible for the sampling point.']
  regulatory_category varchar [note: 'Regulatory regime governing monitoring at this point.']
  sampling_frequency_days varchar [note: 'Number of days between scheduled sampling events.']
  sampling_method varchar [note: 'Method used to collect the sample at this point.']
  state varchar [note: 'State or province of the sampling point location.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the sampling point.']
  type varchar [note: 'Category of media sampled at this point (e.g., air, water).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the sampling point record.']
  zip_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the sampling point address.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for sampling_point. Referenced by sampling_point_id.'
}

Table ehs.facility {
  facility_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for facility']
  parent_facility_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on facility (parent_facility_id)']
  address_line1 varchar [note: 'First line of the facility\'s street address.']
  address_line2 varchar [note: 'Second line of the facility\'s street address, if applicable.']
  capacity_tons_per_year decimal(12,2) [note: 'Maximum annual production capacity in metric tons.']
  city varchar [note: 'City of the facility\'s location.']
  closing_date date [note: 'Date the facility was permanently closed, if applicable.']
  code varchar [note: 'Unique operational code assigned to the facility.']
  compliance_reporting_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the facility\'s regulatory compliance reporting.']
  country varchar [note: 'Three‑letter country code where the facility resides.']
  description varchar [note: 'Additional descriptive information about the facility.']
  ehs_certification_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the facility\'s EHS certifications.']
  ehs_certification_type varchar [note: 'Type of EHS certification held by the facility.']
  emergency_shutoff_available boolean [note: 'Indicates whether an emergency shutoff system is installed and functional.']
  emissions_co2_tons_year decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total CO2 emissions reported for the facility in a calendar year (metric tons).']
  emissions_hap_tons_year decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total hazardous air pollutants emitted by the facility in a calendar year (metric tons).']
  energy_consumption_mwh_year decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total energy consumed by the facility in a calendar year (megawatt‑hours).']
  fire_suppression_system boolean [note: 'Indicates presence of an active fire suppression system.']
  hazardous_materials_handled varchar [note: 'List or description of hazardous materials the facility handles.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date when the most recent EHS inspection was performed.']
  last_reported_tri_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent Toxic Release Inventory (TRI) submission for the facility.']
  latitude double [note: 'Latitude coordinate of the facility location.']
  longitude double [note: 'Longitude coordinate of the facility location.']
  name varchar [note: 'The official name of the facility.']
  next_inspection_due date [note: 'Planned date for the next EHS inspection.']
  number_of_employees varchar [note: 'Total number of employees regularly assigned to the facility.']
  opening_date date [note: 'Date the facility commenced operations.']
  operating_company varchar [note: 'Legal entity that operates the facility.']
  postal_code varchar [note: 'Postal or ZIP code for the facility address.']
  primary_contact_email varchar [note: 'Email address of the primary contact.']
  primary_contact_name varchar [note: 'Name of the primary contact person for the facility.']
  primary_contact_phone varchar [note: 'Phone number of the primary contact.']
  record_audit_created timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the facility record was first created in the system.']
  record_audit_updated timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the facility record.']
  region varchar [note: 'Geographic or organizational region to which the facility belongs.']
  square_footage varchar [note: 'Total building area in square feet.']
  state varchar [note: 'State or province of the facility.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the facility.']
  type varchar [note: 'Category of the facility (e.g., manufacturing plant, distribution center).']
  waste_disposal_method varchar [note: 'Primary method used for waste disposal at the facility.']
  water_usage_cubic_meters_year decimal(12,2) [note: 'Total water consumed by the facility in a calendar year (cubic meters).']

  Note: 'Master reference table for facility. Referenced by facility_id.'
}

Table ehs.control_device {
  control_device_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for control_device']
  location_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the plant or area where the device is installed.']
  upstream_control_device_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on control_device (upstream_control_device_id)']
  alarm_status varchar [note: 'Current alarm condition of the device.']
  alarm_threshold_high decimal(12,4) [note: 'Upper limit that triggers a high‑value alarm.']
  alarm_threshold_low decimal(12,4) [note: 'Lower limit that triggers a low‑value alarm.']
  commissioning_date date [note: 'Date the device became operational after testing.']
  control_strategy varchar [note: 'Algorithm or method the device uses to control a process variable.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the device record was first created.']
  current_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Most recent measurement reported by the device.']
  current_value_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the latest measurement.']
  decommission_date date [note: 'Date the device was removed from service.']
  decommission_reason varchar [note: 'Reason for taking the device out of service.']
  device_code varchar [note: 'Internal code used to reference the device within the EHS system.']
  device_type varchar [note: 'Category of the device indicating its functional role.']
  hazard_classification varchar [note: 'Regulatory hazard class assigned to the device.']
  inspection_interval_days varchar [note: 'Number of days between routine inspections.']
  installation_date date [note: 'Date the device was physically installed at the site.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'True if the device is currently enabled for operation.']
  is_critical boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the device is critical to safety or process continuity.']
  last_inspection_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent safety or compliance inspection.']
  manufacturer varchar [note: 'Name of the company that manufactured the device.']
  max_operating_range decimal(12,4) [note: 'Highest permissible value for safe operation.']
  measurement_type varchar [note: 'Physical variable measured or controlled by the device.']
  measurement_units varchar [note: 'Units of the measured variable (e.g., °C, psi).']
  min_operating_range decimal(12,4) [note: 'Lowest permissible value for safe operation.']
  model_number varchar [note: 'Model designation assigned by the manufacturer.']
  name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name or label of the control device.']
  next_inspection_due date [note: 'Scheduled date for the next required inspection.']
  safety_rating varchar [note: 'Safety classification based on industry standards.']
  serial_number varchar [note: 'Unique serial number stamped on the device hardware.']
  setpoint_units varchar [note: 'Units of the setpoint value (e.g., psi, °C).']
  setpoint_value decimal(12,4) [note: 'Target value the device aims to maintain.']
  status varchar [note: 'Current operational state of the device.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the device record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for control_device. Referenced by control_device_id.'
}

Table ehs.work_activity {
  work_activity_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for work_activity']
  parent_work_activity_id varchar [note: 'Self-referencing FK on work_activity (parent_work_activity_id)']
  activity_category varchar [note: 'High‑level category grouping of the work activity.']
  activity_code varchar [note: 'Short alphanumeric code identifying the work activity type.']
  activity_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the work activity, including purpose and scope.']
  activity_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the work activity.']
  activity_type varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the activity is routine, non‑routine, preventive, or corrective.']
  cost_center_code varchar [note: 'Cost center to which activity costs are charged.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the activity record was first created.']
  department_code varchar [note: 'Department responsible for the activity.']
  emergency_contact_number varchar [note: 'Phone number for the emergency contact associated with the activity.']
  emergency_contact_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether an emergency contact must be on‑site during the activity.']
  emission_type varchar [note: 'Primary environmental emission type associated with the activity.']
  equipment_required varchar [note: 'List of equipment or tools needed to perform the activity.']
  estimated_duration_minutes varchar [note: 'Typical time required to complete the activity, expressed in minutes.']
  exposure_control_plan varchar [note: 'Reference to the exposure control plan document for the activity.']
  hazard_classification varchar [note: 'Primary hazard class associated with the activity.']
  is_active boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the activity type is currently active and usable.']
  is_reportable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the activity must be reported to regulatory agencies.']
  location_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a specific location must be assigned when scheduling the activity.']
  location_type varchar [note: 'Typical location category where the activity is performed.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for additional remarks or special instructions.']
  permit_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a special permit is required to perform the activity.']
  permit_type varchar [note: 'Type of permit required, if any.']
  regulatory_requirement_codes varchar [note: 'Codes of regulatory requirements applicable to the activity (e.g., OSHA, EPA).']
  report_frequency varchar [note: 'How often the activity must be reported.']
  required_training varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of training codes required before performing the activity.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Assessed safety risk level for performing the activity.']
  safety_procedure_document varchar [note: 'Link or identifier to the detailed safety procedure document.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who last modified the activity record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the activity record.']
  waste_generated boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the activity generates waste.']
  waste_type varchar [note: 'Classification of waste produced by the activity.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier who created the activity record.']

  Note: 'Master reference table for work_activity. Referenced by work_activity_id.'
}

Table research.project {
  project_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for project']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Project budgeting and expense allocation require linking each R&D project to its responsible cost center for financial reporting and variance analysis.']
  functional_location_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.functional_location. Business justification: R&D projects are assigned to a plant/lab location for resource allocation, safety oversight, and regulatory traceability.']
  lead_scientist_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Required for Project Lead assignment report; links project lead to employee record for accountability and resource planning.']
  actual_end_date date [note: 'Date when the project was actually closed or completed.']
  application_area varchar [note: 'Specific application or end‑use for the developed compound.']
  budget_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Approved financial budget allocated to the project.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Current compliance standing with applicable regulations.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification for the project\'s information.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the project record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO currency code for the budget.']
  expected_outcome varchar [note: 'Qualitative description of the intended result of the project.']
  external_partner varchar [note: 'Name of any external CRO, university, or partner involved.']
  ip_status varchar [note: 'Current IP protection status for the project outcomes.']
  market_target varchar [note: 'Primary market segment the project aims to serve.']
  milestone_1_date date [note: 'Target or actual date for the first milestone.']
  milestone_1_name varchar [note: 'Name of the first key milestone.']
  milestone_2_date date [note: 'Target or actual date for the second milestone.']
  milestone_2_name varchar [note: 'Name of the second key milestone.']
  patent_filing_status varchar [note: 'Status of any patent applications arising from the project.']
  phase varchar [note: 'Current phase of the project within the innovation pipeline.']
  planned_end_date date [note: 'Target completion date as originally planned.']
  priority_tier varchar [note: 'Business priority assigned to the project.']
  project_code varchar [note: 'External business code or number assigned to the project for tracking across systems.']
  project_description varchar [note: 'Detailed description of the project\'s objectives, scope, and expected deliverables.']
  project_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the R&D project.']
  project_status varchar [note: 'Overall lifecycle status of the project.']
  project_type varchar [note: 'Categorization of the R&D effort.']
  regulatory_approval_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the project outcome must obtain regulatory clearance.']
  related_cas_numbers varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of CAS numbers associated with the project.']
  risk_level varchar [note: 'Assessed risk category for the project.']
  safety_review_status varchar [note: 'Result of internal safety and hazard assessments.']
  sponsor_organization varchar [note: 'Internal or external organization sponsoring the project.']
  stage_gate_date date [note: 'Date of the most recent stage‑gate review.']
  stage_gate_status varchar [note: 'Current stage‑gate decision point for the project.']
  start_date date [note: 'Planned start date of the project.']
  success_criteria varchar [note: 'Specific measurable criteria used to judge project success.']
  technology_readiness_level varchar [note: 'Standardized TRL rating (1‑9) indicating maturity of the technology.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the project record.']

  Note: 'Master record for R&D projects in the chemical manufacturing innovation pipeline. Captures project identity, objectives, scope, phase (discovery, feasibility, scale-up, technology transfer), priority tier, budget allocation, target application market (automotive, agriculture, electronics, etc.), project sponsor, lead scientist, start/end dates, current stage-gate status, and external collaboration context (partner organizations, CRO contracts, IP terms). Serves as the portfolio management backbone for all new compound development and formulation research initiatives, including open innovation partnerships.'
}

Table research.compound_registry {
  compound_registry_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for each compound record.']
  ohs_risk_assessment_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the risk assessment record linked to this compound.']
  boiling_point_c decimal(8,2) [note: 'Temperature at which the compound transitions from liquid to gas at standard pressure.']
  cas_number varchar [note: 'Unique numeric identifier assigned by the CAS registry.']
  compound_type varchar [note: 'Business classification of the compound\'s role in manufacturing.']
  creation_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the compound record was first created in the system.']
  density_g_per_cm3 decimal(8,4) [note: 'Mass per unit volume of the compound at standard conditions.']
  effective_date date [note: 'Date from which the current record version is considered effective.']
  environmental_impact_score decimal(5,2) [note: 'Composite score representing the compound\'s environmental impact.']
  ghs_pictogram_codes varchar [note: 'GHS hazard pictograms applicable to the compound.']
  hazard_classification varchar [note: 'GHS hazard class and category for the compound. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: acute_toxicity|skin_corrosion|eye_damage|respiratory_hazard|environmental_hazard|flammable|explosive|carcinogenic|mutagenic|reproductive_toxicity — promote to reference product]']
  inchi_key varchar [note: 'Fixed‑length hashed representation of the full InChI string.']
  is_controlled_substance boolean [note: 'True if the compound is subject to controlled substance regulations.']
  is_hazardous boolean [note: 'True if the compound is classified as hazardous under GHS.']
  iupac_name varchar [note: 'Official systematic chemical name according to IUPAC rules.']
  last_updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent update to the compound record.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the compound record.']
  melting_point_c decimal(8,2) [note: 'Temperature at which the compound transitions from solid to liquid.']
  molecular_formula varchar [note: 'Empirical formula representing the number and type of atoms in the molecule.']
  molecular_weight decimal(12,4) [note: 'Exact mass of the compound expressed in grams per mole.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations about the compound.']
  origin varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the compound was internally synthesized, externally sourced, or licensed.']
  patent_filing_date date [note: 'Date on which the patent application was filed.']
  patent_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the patent protecting the compound, if any.']
  patent_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the associated patent.']
  physical_state varchar [note: 'Standard state of the compound at ambient conditions.']
  primary_application varchar [note: 'Main industry or market segment where the compound is applied.']
  purity_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Measured purity of the compound expressed as a percent.']
  regulatory_body varchar [note: 'Primary regulatory authority governing the compound.']
  regulatory_status varchar [note: 'Current regulatory approval state of the compound under applicable frameworks (e.g., TSCA, REACH).']
  restricted_use_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the compound is subject to restricted use regulations.']
  shelf_life_days varchar [note: 'Number of days the compound remains usable under recommended storage conditions.']
  smiles_notation varchar [note: 'Linear text representation of the compound\'s structure.']
  storage_temperature_c decimal(8,2) [note: 'Maximum recommended storage temperature for the compound.']
  structural_class varchar [note: 'High‑level classification of the chemical structure (e.g., aromatic, aliphatic, heterocycle).']
  synthesis_route varchar [note: 'High‑level description of the synthetic pathway used to produce the compound.']
  trade_name varchar [note: 'Common commercial name used for the compound in the market.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the compound record for change tracking.']

  Note: 'Authoritative master registry of all chemical compounds developed or evaluated by the R&D organization. Stores compound name (IUPAC and trade), CAS number (assigned or pending), molecular formula, molecular weight, structural class, InChI key, SMILES notation, compound type (intermediate, active ingredient, additive, polymer), origin (synthesized, sourced, licensed), regulatory status under TSCA/REACH, and hazard classification per GHS. This is the SSOT for compound identity across the enterprise.'
}

Table research.experimental_formulation {
  experimental_formulation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the experimental formulation record.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the lead scientist responsible for the formulation.']
  formula_version_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to formulation.formula_version. Business justification: Experimental Formulation Validation requires referencing the exact formula version being tested, enabling traceability from lab to production.']
  material_master_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to rawmaterial.material_master. Business justification: Formulation BOM requires a direct link to the primary raw material for sourcing, cost, and compliance; material_master_id provides this, removing duplicate cas_number.']
  pilot_equipment_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.equipment. Business justification: Pilot‑scale formulations are produced on specific pilot equipment; linking supports maintenance planning and equipment utilization analysis.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the R&D project to which this formulation belongs.']
  safety_data_sheet_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the associated Safety Data Sheet record.']
  active_ingredient_concentration decimal(12,4) [note: 'Concentration value of the primary active ingredient.']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'Identifier for the specific batch used in experimental runs.']
  blend_ratio_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of component blend ratios used in the formulation.']
  concentration_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for active ingredient concentration.']
  cost_estimate_usd decimal(15,2) [note: 'Estimated cost to scale the formulation to commercial production, expressed in USD.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the formulation record was first created.']
  data_source_system varchar [note: 'System that originated the record.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date from which the formulation is considered effective for use.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date until which the formulation remains effective (null if open-ended).']
  experimental_end_date date [note: 'Date when experimental work on the formulation concluded.']
  experimental_formulation_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the experimental formulation.']
  experimental_start_date date [note: 'Date when experimental work on the formulation began.']
  formulation_code varchar [note: 'Unique code assigned to the formulation for internal tracking.']
  formulation_description varchar [note: 'Detailed textual description of the formulation composition and purpose.']
  ghs_classification varchar [note: 'GHS hazard classification for the formulation.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Overall lifecycle stage of the formulation within R&D.']
  lot_number varchar [note: 'Lot identifier for raw material(s) used in the formulation.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for any additional remarks or observations.']
  patent_filing_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the patent filing associated with the formulation.']
  patent_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the related patent.']
  ph_target_max decimal(5,2) [note: 'Maximum target pH value for the formulation.']
  ph_target_min decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum target pH value for the formulation.']
  reach_registration_number varchar [note: 'Regulatory registration identifier under the REACH framework.']
  regulatory_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current status of regulatory approval for the formulation.']
  scale_up_feasibility varchar [note: 'Qualitative assessment of the formulation\'s feasibility for scale-up.']
  solvent_system varchar [note: 'Description of the solvent(s) used in the formulation.']
  stability_study_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a stability study is required for this formulation.']
  stability_test_duration_days varchar [note: 'Planned duration of the stability study in days.']
  target_application varchar [note: 'Intended end-use or application area for the experimental formulation (e.g., coating, adhesive).']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the formulation record.']
  version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the formulation record, e.g., v1.0, v2.1.']
  viscosity_target decimal(12,4) [note: 'Desired viscosity value for the formulation.']
  viscosity_unit varchar [note: 'Unit of measure for viscosity target.']

  Note: 'Records lab-scale and pilot-scale experimental formulations developed during R&D. Captures formulation code, version, target application, blend ratios, active ingredient concentrations (PPM or weight percent), solvent system, pH target range, viscosity target, experimental status (draft, active, archived, transferred), associated compound registry entries, and the R&D project it belongs to. Distinct from the commercial formulation domain — these are pre-commercial, version-controlled research records managed in LabWare LIMS.'
}

Table research.synthesis_procedure {
  synthesis_procedure_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique identifier for the synthesis procedure.']
  compound_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to research.compound_registry. Business justification: Synthesis procedures are defined for a specific compound; adding compound_registry_id creates a direct link to the master compound record.']
  equipment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the primary reactor or equipment used.']
  operator_employee_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to workforce.employee. Business justification: Needed for SOP execution log; ties the operator performing the synthesis to employee for safety training compliance.']
  research_process_simulation_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the Aspen HYSYS simulation model linked to this procedure.']
  approved_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the procedure was approved.']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the trial batch associated with this procedure.']
  catalyst varchar [note: 'Catalyst used in the reaction, including name and grade.']
  change_control_number varchar [note: 'Management of Change (MOC) identifier associated with any amendment.']
  cost_estimate_usd decimal(12,2) [note: 'Estimated cost to execute the procedure at lab scale in US dollars.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the procedure record was created.']
  document_version varchar [note: 'Version identifier of the attached procedure document.']
  effective_from date [note: 'Date from which the procedure is considered valid.']
  effective_until date [note: 'Date after which the procedure is no longer valid (nullable).']
  emissions_co2_kg decimal(8,3) [note: 'Estimated CO₂ emissions for the procedure per batch.']
  expected_yield_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Target yield expressed as a percentage of theoretical maximum.']
  hazard_class varchar [note: 'Primary hazard classification of the reaction according to GHS.']
  is_critical boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the procedure is marked as critical for production scale‑up.']
  is_patentable boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the procedure is considered patentable.']
  lab_location varchar [note: 'Physical location or lab where the procedure is performed.']
  lifecycle_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the procedure.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form notes captured by the chemist.']
  patent_application_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the patent application linked to this procedure, if any.']
  ph_range varchar [note: 'Target pH range for the reaction, expressed as min‑max.']
  pressure_bar decimal(6,2) [note: 'Operating pressure for the reaction in bar.']
  procedure_code varchar [note: 'Internal code used to reference the synthesis procedure.']
  procedure_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the synthesis procedure.']
  reaction_time_minutes varchar [note: 'Total duration of the reaction in minutes.']
  reagent_list varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of reagents with quantities and purity.']
  regulatory_compliance_codes varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of applicable regulatory codes (e.g., REACH, TSCA).']
  review_comments varchar [note: 'Comments from scientific review board.']
  safety_precautions varchar [note: 'Key safety measures and PPE required, aligned with PSM.']
  scale_kg decimal(10,3) [note: 'Mass of the batch at lab scale in kilograms.']
  solvent varchar [note: 'Primary solvent employed in the reaction.']
  sop_reference varchar [note: 'Reference to the governing SOP document.']
  synthesis_type varchar [note: 'Category of chemical reaction performed.']
  temperature_c decimal(6,2) [note: 'Operating temperature for the reaction in degrees Celsius.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time of the most recent modification.']
  validation_status varchar [note: 'Status of experimental validation of the procedure.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the procedure record.']
  waste_generated_kg decimal(8,3) [note: 'Estimated amount of waste produced per batch in kilograms.']

  Note: 'Documented synthesis route and reaction procedure for producing a compound or intermediate at lab scale. Includes procedure code, reaction type (condensation, polymerization, oxidation, hydrogenation, etc.), reagent list, stoichiometry, reaction conditions (temperature, pressure, catalyst, solvent), expected yield range, safety precautions (PSM-relevant), SOP reference, version history, and approval status. Managed in LabWare LIMS and linked to Aspen HYSYS simulation records for scale-up feasibility.'
}

Table research.lab_experiment {
  lab_experiment_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the laboratory experiment record.']
  cas_registry_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to rawmaterial.cas_registry. Business justification: Safety and compliance reporting ties each lab experiment to the official CAS registry entry; cas_registry_id replaces the free‑text cas_number.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the R&D scientist responsible for executing the experiment.']
  functional_location_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.functional_location. Business justification: Required for safety, capacity, and regulatory reporting: each lab experiment is performed in a specific functional location (lab).']
  lab_equipment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the primary equipment or instrument used during the experiment.']
  project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the R&D project under which the experiment is conducted.']
  safety_data_sheet_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the Safety Data Sheet associated with the chemical used.']
  trial_batch_id varchar [note: 'Identifier for the trial batch produced in this experiment.']
  actual_duration_min varchar [note: 'Actual elapsed time of the experiment in minutes.']
  actual_pressure_bar decimal(10,2) [note: 'Measured pressure recorded during the experiment.']
  actual_temperature_c decimal(10,2) [note: 'Measured temperature achieved during the experiment.']
  analysis_software_version varchar [note: 'Version of the software used to analyze experiment data.']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'Manufacturing batch number associated with the experimental material.']
  corrective_action varchar [note: 'Action taken to correct a deviation identified during the experiment.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the experiment record was first created in the system.']
  data_file_path varchar [note: 'File system path or URI to raw data files generated by the experiment.']
  data_quality_score decimal(4,2) [note: 'Numeric score representing the overall quality of the experiment data.']
  deviation_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the experiment deviated from the planned protocol.']
  effectiveness_check varchar [note: 'Result of the effectiveness assessment for corrective actions.']
  electronic_notebook_ref varchar [note: 'Link or identifier to the electronic lab notebook entry documenting the experiment.']
  end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the experiment execution finished or was terminated.']
  experiment_code varchar [note: 'Business identifier assigned to the experiment, used for tracking and reporting.']
  experiment_type varchar [note: 'Category of the experiment indicating its purpose or methodology.']
  instrument_method varchar [note: 'Analytical or synthesis method employed by the instrument.']
  lab_experiment_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle state of the experiment.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional comments or observations.']
  observed_outcome varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the experimental result or observation.']
  planned_duration_min varchar [note: 'Intended duration of the experiment in minutes.']
  planned_pressure_bar decimal(10,2) [note: 'Target pressure set for the experiment in bar.']
  planned_temperature_c decimal(10,2) [note: 'Target temperature set for the experiment in degrees Celsius.']
  preventive_action varchar [note: 'Planned action to prevent recurrence of the identified issue.']
  purity_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Measured purity of the final product expressed as a percentage.']
  quality_control_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the experiment passed internal quality control criteria.']
  regulatory_compliance_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether the experiment meets applicable regulatory requirements.']
  root_cause varchar [note: 'Identified root cause for any deviation or failure.']
  sample_preparation_details varchar [note: 'Description of how the sample was prepared prior to the experiment.']
  start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the experiment execution began.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the experiment record.']
  verification_status varchar [note: 'Status of verification for corrective/preventive actions.']
  yield_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Percentage of product obtained relative to theoretical maximum.']

  Note: 'Transactional record of an individual laboratory experiment or synthesis run executed by R&D scientists, serving as the primary execution and deviation management record. Captures experiment ID, type (synthesis, screening, characterization, stability, compatibility), assigned scientist, electronic lab notebook reference, start/end datetime, equipment used, actual conditions vs. planned, observed outcomes, yield, purity, experiment status (planned, in-progress, completed, failed, cancelled). For deviations and failures: root cause investigation findings, corrective actions taken, preventive measures, verification status, and effectiveness check outcome. Integrates with LabWare LIMS for execution tracking and serves as the R&D-specific deviation record supporting GMP compliance and continuous improvement.'
}

Table research.trial_batch {
  trial_batch_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for trial_batch']
  coa_document_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the COA document generated for this trial batch.']
  cost_center_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to finance.cost_center. Business justification: Batch production costs are charged to a cost center; linking trial batch to cost center enables accurate cost accounting and batch‑level expense tracking.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the plant operator responsible for the batch run.']
  equipment_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the reactor or vessel used for the trial batch run.']
  experimental_formulation_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the experimental formulation being validated in this trial batch.']
  lot_record_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to rawmaterial.lot_record. Business justification: Regulatory traceability report requires linking each trial batch to the exact raw‑material lot used; lot_record_id provides this, replacing the denormalized lot_number.']
  org_unit_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the manufacturing site or plant where the trial batch was run.']
  project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the R&D project that owns this trial batch.']
  work_order_id varchar [note: 'Foreign key linking to maintenance.work_order. Business justification: Batch production is driven by a work order; linking enables cost tracking, schedule alignment, and compliance reporting.']
  actual_yield_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Measured product yield achieved in the trial batch.']
  agitation_speed_rpm varchar [note: 'Rotational speed of the agitator during the batch, in revolutions per minute.']
  avg_temperature_c decimal(6,2) [note: 'Mean temperature across the batch duration, in degrees Celsius.']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'Human‑readable identifier assigned to the trial batch (often the LOT number).']
  batch_size_kg decimal(12,3) [note: 'Planned total mass of material processed in the trial batch, expressed in kilograms.']
  batch_version varchar [note: 'Version number of the batch recipe or procedure used.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the trial batch record was first created in the system.']
  disposition varchar [note: 'Final disposition after evaluation (e.g., pass, fail, hold, rework).']
  emission_estimate_kg decimal(12,3) [note: 'Estimated mass of regulated emissions generated during the trial batch.']
  energy_consumption_mwh decimal(12,3) [note: 'Electrical energy consumed by the batch process, expressed in megawatt‑hours.']
  feed_rate_kg_per_hr decimal(10,3) [note: 'Rate at which reactants were fed into the reactor, kilograms per hour.']
  hazard_class varchar [note: 'Regulatory hazard classification (e.g., GHS class 1‑6).']
  is_hazardous boolean [note: 'True if the batch involved hazardous chemicals; otherwise false.']
  max_temperature_c decimal(6,2) [note: 'Highest temperature recorded during the batch run, in degrees Celsius.']
  min_temperature_c decimal(6,2) [note: 'Lowest temperature recorded during the batch run, in degrees Celsius.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form comments or observations captured by operators or scientists.']
  process_end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the trial batch processing completed or was stopped.']
  process_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time when the trial batch processing began.']
  quality_status varchar [note: 'Result of quality control testing for the trial batch.']
  regulatory_compliance_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the batch met all applicable regulatory requirements (true) or not (false).']
  safety_review_status varchar [note: 'Status of the safety and regulatory review for the trial batch.']
  sampling_point_count varchar [note: 'Number of intermediate sampling points taken for analysis during the batch.']
  sampling_points_description varchar [note: 'Free‑text description of sampling times, locations, and purposes.']
  shift_code varchar [note: 'Work shift during which the batch was executed.']
  target_yield_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Planned product yield expressed as a percentage of theoretical maximum.']
  trial_batch_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the trial batch.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last modified the record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Date‑time of the most recent modification to the trial batch record.']
  waste_generated_kg decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total weight of waste material produced by the trial batch.']
  yield_difference_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Difference between actual and target yield (actual – target).']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the record.']

  Note: 'Records pilot-scale and trial batch manufacturing runs executed to validate R&D formulations and synthesis procedures before technology transfer to commercial production. Captures trial batch number (LOT), batch size, reactor/vessel used, process parameters (temperature profile, agitation speed, feed rates), actual vs. target yield, intermediate sampling points, batch disposition (pass, fail, hold, rework), and linkage to the experimental formulation and synthesis procedure being validated. Bridges R&D and production domains.'
}

Table research.rd_stability_study {
  rd_stability_study_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the stability study record.']
  compound_registry_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the chemical compound (CAS number) being evaluated.']
  employee_id varchar [note: 'Internal identifier of the scientist accountable for the study execution.']
  experimental_formulation_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the specific formulation or batch used in the study.']
  lab_instrument_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the analytical instrument used for measurements in the study.']
  stability_study_id varchar [note: 'FK to quality.stability_study.stability_study_id — R&D stability studies must link to quality stability study master for technology transfer and unified stability trending across development and commercial phases.']
  acceptance_criteria_assay_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Minimum acceptable assay potency percentage for the product to pass the study.']
  acceptance_criteria_color varchar [note: 'Qualitative color change tolerance for the product.']
  acceptance_criteria_particulate_ppm decimal(10,2) [note: 'Maximum permissible particulate count expressed in parts per million.']
  acceptance_criteria_ph decimal(4,2) [note: 'Acceptable pH range limit for the product during the study.']
  acceptance_criteria_viscosity_cp decimal(8,2) [note: 'Maximum allowable viscosity (centipoise) for the product to be considered stable.']
  actual_completion_date date [note: 'Date on which the study was actually completed.']
  batch_lot_number varchar [note: 'Lot number of the experimental batch subjected to the stability study.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the stability study record was first created in the system.']
  data_quality_status varchar [note: 'Overall quality assessment of the study data.']
  end_date date [note: 'Planned completion date for the stability study.']
  is_oos_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether any measured parameter fell outside the predefined acceptance criteria.']
  is_oot_flag boolean [note: 'Indicates whether observed trends deviate from expected stability patterns.']
  light_exposure_lux decimal(8,2) [note: 'Illuminance level applied for photostability studies, measured in lux.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free-text field for additional observations, comments, or special instructions.']
  rd_stability_study_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the stability study.']
  regulatory_protocol_reference varchar [note: 'Identifier or document reference for the regulatory protocol governing the study (e.g., ICH Q1A, EPA guideline).']
  sampling_interval_months varchar [note: 'Interval between scheduled sampling timepoints, expressed in months.']
  shelf_life_estimate_months varchar [note: 'Projected shelf life of the product based on study results, expressed in months.']
  start_date date [note: 'Date on which the stability study was initiated.']
  storage_condition_description varchar [note: 'Narrative description of the storage conditions (e.g., sealed, protected from light).']
  study_code varchar [note: 'Business-assigned alphanumeric code that uniquely identifies the stability study across systems.']
  study_duration_months varchar [note: 'Total planned duration of the stability study expressed in months.']
  study_name varchar [note: 'Descriptive name of the stability study, often reflecting the compound or formulation under test.']
  study_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the study based on the testing protocol applied.']
  test_humidity_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Controlled relative humidity level for the study environment, expressed as a percentage.']
  test_temperature_c decimal(5,2) [note: 'Controlled temperature at which the sample is stored during the study, expressed in degrees Celsius.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent modification to the stability study record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Version of the study record, incremented on substantive changes.']

  Note: 'Master and detail record for stability studies conducted on experimental compounds and formulations per ICH Q1A/Q1B, EPA, and internal protocols. Master level captures study ID, study type (accelerated, real-time, photostability, freeze-thaw), test conditions (temperature, humidity, light exposure), study duration, sampling intervals, acceptance criteria, regulatory protocol reference, study status, and responsible scientist. Detail level captures each scheduled timepoint: interval (T=0, T=1mo, T=3mo, T=6mo, etc.), actual test date, parameters measured (assay, pH, viscosity, color, particulate count, degradation products in PPM), pass/fail against criteria, OOS/OOT flags, analyst ID, and instrument reference. Supports shelf-life determination, trend analysis, and product registration.'
}

Table research.patent_filing {
  patent_filing_id varchar [pk, note: 'System-generated unique identifier for the patent filing record.']
  licensing_agreement_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the licensing agreement record, if any.']
  project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the R&D project that generated the invention disclosure.']
  abstract varchar [note: 'Brief summary of the invention disclosed in the patent application.']
  attorney_contact varchar [note: 'Primary email address of the attorney handling the filing.']
  attorney_firm varchar [note: 'Name of the law firm representing the patent applicant.']
  confidentiality_level varchar [note: 'Data classification level for the patent filing record.']
  cost_amount decimal(18,2) [note: 'Estimated monetary cost to file and prosecute the patent.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the patent filing record was first created in the system.']
  currency_code varchar [note: 'Three‑letter ISO 4217 currency code for cost_amount.']
  docket_number varchar [note: 'Internal docket number used to track the filing within the organization.']
  estimated_commercial_value_tier varchar [note: 'Business‑level estimate of the potential commercial value of the invention.']
  expiration_date date [note: 'Date the patent rights expire (typically 20 years from priority date).']
  filing_date date [note: 'Date the patent application was officially filed with the patent office.']
  filing_number varchar [note: 'Unique number assigned by the patent office at the time of filing.']
  fto_assessment_date date [note: 'Date the FTO assessment was performed.']
  fto_result varchar [note: 'Outcome of the FTO assessment.']
  grant_date date [note: 'Date the patent was granted by the patent office.']
  inventor_names varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of inventor full names; each name is considered PII.']
  ip_committee_decision varchar [note: 'Outcome of the internal IP committee review (approve, reject, or defer).']
  is_freedom_to_operate_assessed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a freedom‑to‑operate (FTO) analysis has been completed.']
  jurisdiction varchar [note: 'Geographic jurisdiction or patent office where the application was filed.']
  licensing_status varchar [note: 'Whether the patented technology is currently licensed to third parties.']
  maintenance_fee_due_date date [note: 'Date by which the next maintenance fee must be paid to keep the patent in force.']
  maintenance_fee_status varchar [note: 'Current status of the upcoming maintenance fee.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information or comments.']
  patent_application_number varchar [note: 'Official application number assigned by the patent office.']
  patent_family_code varchar [note: 'Identifier linking related patent applications that belong to the same family.']
  patent_filing_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the patent filing. [ENUM-REF-CANDIDATE: draft|filed|published|granted|expired|abandoned|rejected — promote to reference product]']
  patent_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the patent (e.g., composition of matter, process, use, or product).']
  prior_art_search_status varchar [note: 'Progress status of the prior‑art search for the invention.']
  priority_claim_number varchar [note: 'Number of the priority claim if the filing claims priority to an earlier application.']
  priority_date date [note: 'Date of the earliest filing that establishes priority for the invention.']
  publication_date date [note: 'Date the patent application was published and made publicly available.']
  related_cas_numbers varchar [note: 'Comma‑separated list of CAS numbers referenced in the invention.']
  technology_area varchar [note: 'High‑level technology domain of the invention.']
  title varchar [note: 'Official title of the invention as filed in the patent application.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the patent filing record.']

  Note: 'Master record for the full intellectual property lifecycle from invention disclosure through patent grant. Captures initial disclosure (inventors, novelty description, prior art search status, IP committee review decision, estimated commercial value tier), patent application details (filing number, jurisdiction, priority date, patent type — composition of matter, process, use), prosecution status, publication and grant dates, expiration, and legal status. Supports IP portfolio management, freedom-to-operate assessments, and innovation pipeline tracking from first scientist disclosure through granted protection.'
}

Table research.technology_transfer {
  technology_transfer_id varchar [pk, note: 'Unique system-generated identifier for the technology transfer record.']
  rd_project_id varchar [note: 'Identifier of the R&D project that originated the technology being transferred.']
  transfer_package_document_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the document package containing process description, BOM, SOP, COA specifications.']
  associated_cas_numbers varchar [note: 'Comma-separated list of CAS numbers related to the transferred chemical compounds.']
  batch_number varchar [note: 'Identifier of the trial batch associated with the technology transfer.']
  compliance_status varchar [note: 'Overall regulatory compliance status of the transferred technology.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the technology transfer record was first created in the system.']
  deviation_notes varchar [note: 'Notes describing any deviations identified during the transfer process.']
  effective_from timestamp [note: 'Timestamp from which the transfer information is considered effective for downstream processes.']
  effective_until timestamp [note: 'Timestamp indicating when the transfer information ceases to be effective, if applicable.']
  ip_status varchar [note: 'Current IP protection status of the transferred technology.']
  manufacturing_signoff_date timestamp [note: 'Date and time when manufacturing approved receipt of the technology.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Additional free-form notes related to the technology transfer.']
  open_action_items varchar [note: 'List of unresolved action items resulting from the transfer assessment.']
  quality_status varchar [note: 'Result of quality control assessment for the transferred technology.']
  r_and_d_signoff_date timestamp [note: 'Date and time when R&D authorized the technology transfer.']
  readiness_checklist_completed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether the predefined readiness checklist has been fully completed.']
  readiness_checklist_date timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the readiness checklist was marked complete.']
  regulatory_approval_required boolean [note: 'Indicates whether external regulatory approval is required for the transferred technology.']
  regulatory_approval_status varchar [note: 'Current status of any required regulatory approvals.']
  safety_review_completed boolean [note: 'Indicates whether a safety review has been completed for the transfer.']
  safety_review_date timestamp [note: 'Date and time when the safety review was finalized.']
  technology_readiness_level varchar [note: 'Numeric level (1-9) indicating the maturity of the technology being transferred.']
  transfer_category varchar [note: 'High-level classification of what is being transferred.']
  transfer_cost_amount decimal(15,2) [note: 'Monetary cost associated with the technology transfer, including engineering and validation expenses.']
  transfer_cost_currency varchar [note: 'Three-letter ISO 4217 currency code for the transfer cost.']
  transfer_description varchar [note: 'Free-text description summarizing the technology being transferred, objectives, and key considerations.']
  transfer_end_date date [note: 'Actual completion date of the technology transfer.']
  transfer_number varchar [note: 'Business-visible reference number for the technology transfer, used in documentation and tracking.']
  transfer_start_date date [note: 'Planned start date of the technology transfer activity.']
  transfer_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the technology transfer process.']
  transfer_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the transfer pathway indicating source and target production scale.']
  updated_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who last modified the record.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the technology transfer record.']
  version_number varchar [note: 'Incremental version number for the record to support optimistic concurrency.']
  created_by varchar [note: 'User identifier of the person who created the record.']

  Note: 'Transactional record documenting the formal handoff of a validated R&D process, formulation, or compound from the R&D organization to commercial manufacturing. Captures transfer ID, transfer type (lab-to-pilot, pilot-to-commercial), sending R&D project, receiving production plant/site, transfer package documents (process description, BOM, SOP, COA specifications), readiness checklist completion status, sign-off dates by R&D and manufacturing, and any open action items or deviations noted during transfer. Integrates with SAP PP and MES.'
}

Table research.research_process_simulation {
  research_process_simulation_id varchar [pk, note: 'Primary key for process_simulation']
  associated_formulation_experimental_formulation_id varchar [note: 'Reference to the formulation entity that this simulation evaluates.']
  associated_procedure varchar [note: 'Name or identifier of the laboratory synthesis procedure linked to this simulation.']
  capital_cost_estimate_usd decimal(15,2) [note: 'Preliminary capital expenditure estimate for implementing the simulated process, expressed in US dollars.']
  conversion_rate_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Primary conversion metric expressed as a percentage.']
  created_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the simulation record was first created.']
  energy_consumption_mwh decimal(12,3) [note: 'Total energy consumption of the simulated process in megawatt‑hours.']
  feasibility_outcome varchar [note: 'Result of the scale‑up feasibility assessment.']
  hazop_findings varchar [note: 'Key findings from HAZOP or PHA analyses related to the simulated process.']
  identified_scale_up_challenges varchar [note: 'Narrative description of heat, mass, mixing, or safety challenges identified for scale‑up.']
  model_tool varchar [note: 'Software tool used to build and run the simulation.']
  notes varchar [note: 'Free‑form field for any supplemental information or comments.']
  process_units_modeled varchar [note: 'List of major process units (reactor, separator, heat exchanger, etc.) represented in the model.']
  recommended_process_modifications varchar [note: 'Suggested changes to equipment, operating conditions, or control strategies to improve feasibility.']
  scale_factor decimal(5,2) [note: 'Factor by which the lab‑scale results are extrapolated (e.g., 10×).']
  selectivity_percent decimal(5,2) [note: 'Selectivity of desired product relative to by‑products, expressed as a percentage.']
  simulation_end_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the simulation execution completed.']
  simulation_name varchar [note: 'Human‑readable name of the simulation model.']
  simulation_start_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp when the simulation execution began.']
  simulation_status varchar [note: 'Current lifecycle status of the simulation run.']
  simulation_type varchar [note: 'Classification of the simulation methodology.']
  thermodynamic_model varchar [note: 'Thermodynamic correlation or equation of state applied in the simulation.']
  updated_timestamp timestamp [note: 'Timestamp of the most recent update to the simulation record.']
  validation_date date [note: 'Date on which the simulation was validated.']
  validation_status varchar [note: 'Indicates whether simulation results have been validated against experimental data.']
